1071: void LcdDisplay::SetTheme(Theme *theme)
1072: {
1073:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
1074: 
1075:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(theme);
1076: 
1077:     // Get the active screen
1078:     lv_obj_t *screen = lv_screen_active();
1079: 
1080:     // Set font
1081:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
1082:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
1083:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
1084: 
1085:     if (text_font->line_height >= 40)
1086:     {
1087:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1088:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1089:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1090:     }
1091:     else
1092:     {
1093:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
1094:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
1095:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
1096:     }
1097: 
1098:     // Set parent text color
1099:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
1100:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1101: 
1102:     // Set background image
1103:     if (lvgl_theme->background_image() != nullptr)
1104:     {
1105:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, lvgl_theme->background_image()->image_dsc(), 0);
1106:     }
1107:     else
1108:     {
1109:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, nullptr, 0);
1110:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1111:     }
1112: 
1113:     // Update top bar background color with 50% opacity
1114:     if (top_bar_ != nullptr)
1115:     {
1116:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
1117:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1118:     }
1119: 
1120:     // Update status bar elements
1121:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1122:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1123:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1124:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1125:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1126:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1127: 
1128:     // If we have the chat message style, update all message bubbles
1129: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
1130:     // Set content background opacity
1131:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(content_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
1132: 
1133:     // Iterate through all children of content (message containers or bubbles)
1134:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
1135:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < child_count; i++)
1136:     {
1137:         lv_obj_t *obj = lv_obj_get_child(content_, i);
1138:         if (obj == nullptr)
1139:             continue;
1140: 
1141:         lv_obj_t *bubble = nullptr;
1142: 
1143:         // Check if this object is a container or bubble
1144:         // If it's a container (user or system message), get its child as bubble
1145:         // If it's a bubble (assistant message), use it directly
1146:         if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(obj) > 0)
1147:         {
1148:             // Might be a container, check if it's a user or system message container
1149:             // User and system message containers are transparent
1150:             lv_opa_t bg_opa = lv_obj_get_style_bg_opa(obj, 0);
1151:             if (bg_opa == LV_OPA_TRANSP)
1152:             {
1153:                 // This is a user or system message container
1154:                 bubble = lv_obj_get_child(obj, 0);
1155:             }
1156:             else
1157:             {
1158:                 // This might be an assistant message bubble itself
1159:                 bubble = obj;
1160:             }
1161:         }
1162:         else
1163:         {
1164:             // No child elements, might be other UI elements, skip
1165:             continue;
1166:         }
1167: 
1168:         if (bubble == nullptr)
1169:             continue;
1170: 
1171:         // Use saved user data to identify bubble type
1172:         void *bubble_type_ptr = lv_obj_get_user_data(bubble);
1173:         if (bubble_type_ptr != nullptr)
1174:         {
1175:             const char *bubble_type = static_cast<const char *>(bubble_type_ptr);
1176: 
1177:             // Apply correct color based on bubble type
1178:             if (strcmp(bubble_type, "user") == 0)
1179:             {
1180:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->user_bubble_color(), 0);
1181:             }
1182:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "assistant") == 0)
1183:             {
1184:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
1185:             }
1186:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
1187:             {
1188:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
1189:             }
1190:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "image") == 0)
1191:             {
1192:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
1193:             }
1194: 
1195:             // Update border color
1196:             lv_obj_set_style_border_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
1197: 
1198:             // Update text color for the message
1199:             if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(bubble) > 0)
1200:             {
1201:                 lv_obj_t *text = lv_obj_get_child(bubble, 0);
1202:                 if (text != nullptr)
1203:                 {
1204:                     // Set text color based on bubble type
1205:                     if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
1206:                     {
1207:                         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(text, lvgl_theme->system_text_color(), 0);
1208:                     }
1209:                     else
1210:                     {
1211:                         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1212:                     }
1213:                 }
1214:             }
1215:         }
1216:         else
1217:         {
1218:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "child[%lu] Bubble type is not found", i);
1219:         }
1220:     }
1221: #else
1222:     // Simple UI mode - just update the main chat message
1223:     if (chat_message_label_ != nullptr)
1224:     {
1225:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(chat_message_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1226:     }
1227: 
1228:     if (emoji_label_ != nullptr)
1229:     {
1230:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1231:     }
1232: 
1233:     // Update bottom bar background color with 50% opacity
1234:     if (bottom_bar_ != nullptr)
1235:     {
1236:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(bottom_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
1237:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bottom_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1238:     }
1239: #endif
1240: 
1241:     // Update low battery popup
1242:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->low_battery_color(), 0);
1243: 
1244:     // No errors occurred. Save theme to settings
1245:     Display::SetTheme(lvgl_theme);
1246: }

The `LcdDisplay` constructor initializes the LCD display with the given panel IO and dimensions, sets up themes from stored settings, and creates a timer to automatically clear the preview image after a set duration. It prepares the display for rendering UI elements and manages theme configuration and preview image timing.

- Same callback implementation and timer configuration
No functionality is missing or altered.

24: void LcdDisplay::InitializeLcdThemes()
25: {
26:     auto text_font = std::make_shared<LvglBuiltInFont>(&BUILTIN_TEXT_FONT);
27:     auto icon_font = std::make_shared<LvglBuiltInFont>(&BUILTIN_ICON_FONT);
28:     auto large_icon_font = std::make_shared<LvglBuiltInFont>(&font_awesome_30_4);
29: 
30:     // light theme
31:     auto light_theme = new LvglTheme("light");
32:     light_theme->set_background_color(lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF));
33:     light_theme->set_text_color(lv_color_hex(0x000000));
34:     light_theme->set_chat_background_color(lv_color_hex(0xE0E0E0));
35:     light_theme->set_user_bubble_color(lv_color_hex(0x00FF00));
36:     light_theme->set_assistant_bubble_color(lv_color_hex(0xDDDDDD));
37:     light_theme->set_system_bubble_color(lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF));
38:     light_theme->set_system_text_color(lv_color_hex(0x000000));
39:     light_theme->set_border_color(lv_color_hex(0x000000));
40:     light_theme->set_low_battery_color(lv_color_hex(0x000000));
41:     light_theme->set_text_font(text_font);
42:     light_theme->set_icon_font(icon_font);
43:     light_theme->set_large_icon_font(large_icon_font);
44: 
45:     // dark theme
46:     auto dark_theme = new LvglTheme("dark");
47:     dark_theme->set_background_color(lv_color_hex(0x000000));
48:     dark_theme->set_text_color(lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF));
49:     dark_theme->set_chat_background_color(lv_color_hex(0x1F1F1F));
50:     dark_theme->set_user_bubble_color(lv_color_hex(0x00FF00));
51:     dark_theme->set_assistant_bubble_color(lv_color_hex(0x222222));
52:     dark_theme->set_system_bubble_color(lv_color_hex(0x000000));
53:     dark_theme->set_system_text_color(lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF));
54:     dark_theme->set_border_color(lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF));
55:     dark_theme->set_low_battery_color(lv_color_hex(0xFF0000));
56:     dark_theme->set_text_font(text_font);
57:     dark_theme->set_icon_font(icon_font);
58:     dark_theme->set_large_icon_font(large_icon_font);
59: 
60:     auto &theme_manager = LvglThemeManager::GetInstance();
61:     theme_manager.RegisterTheme("light", light_theme);
62:     theme_manager.RegisterTheme("dark", dark_theme);
63: }

65: LcdDisplay::LcdDisplay(esp_lcd_panel_io_handle_t panel_io, esp_lcd_panel_handle_t panel, int width, int height)
66:     : panel_io_(panel_io), panel_(panel)
67: {
68:     width_ = width;
69:     height_ = height;
70: 
71:     // Initialize LCD themes
72:     InitializeLcdThemes();
73: 
74:     // Load theme from settings
75:     Settings settings("display", false);
76:     std::string theme_name = settings.GetString("theme", "light");
77:     current_theme_ = LvglThemeManager::GetInstance().GetTheme(theme_name);
78: 
79:     // Create a timer to hide the preview image
80:     esp_timer_create_args_t preview_timer_args = {
81:         .callback = [](void *arg)
82:         {
83:             LcdDisplay *display = static_cast<LcdDisplay *>(arg);
84:             display->SetPreviewImage(nullptr);
85:         },
86:         .arg = this,
87:         .dispatch_method = ESP_TIMER_TASK,
88:         .name = "preview_timer",
89:         .skip_unhandled_events = false,
90:     };
91:     esp_timer_create(&preview_timer_args, &preview_timer_);
92: }

97: // RGB LCD implementation
98: RgbLcdDisplay::RgbLcdDisplay(esp_lcd_panel_io_handle_t panel_io, esp_lcd_panel_handle_t panel,
99:                              int width, int height, int offset_x, int offset_y,
100:                              bool mirror_x, bool mirror_y, bool swap_xy)
101:     : LcdDisplay(panel_io, panel, width, height)
102: {
103: 
104:     // draw white
105:     std::vector<uint16_t> buffer(width_, 0xFFFF);
106:     for (int y = 0; y < height_; y++)
107:     {
108:         esp_lcd_panel_draw_bitmap(panel_, 0, y, width_, y + 1, buffer.data());
109:     }
110: 
111:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initialize LVGL library");
112:     lv_init();
113: 
114:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initialize LVGL port");
115:     lvgl_port_cfg_t port_cfg = ESP_LVGL_PORT_INIT_CONFIG();
116:     port_cfg.task_priority = 1;
117:     port_cfg.timer_period_ms = 50;
118:     lvgl_port_init(&port_cfg);
119: 
120:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Adding LCD display");
121:     const lvgl_port_display_cfg_t display_cfg = {
122:         .io_handle = panel_io_,
123:         .panel_handle = panel_,
124:         .buffer_size = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_ * 20),
125:         .double_buffer = true,
126:         .hres = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_),
127:         .vres = static_cast<uint32_t>(height_),
128:         .rotation = {
129:             .swap_xy = swap_xy,
130:             .mirror_x = mirror_x,
131:             .mirror_y = mirror_y,
132:         },
133:         .flags = {
134:             .buff_dma = 1,
135:             .swap_bytes = 0,
136:             .full_refresh = 1,
137:             .direct_mode = 1,
138:         },
139:     };
140: 
141:     const lvgl_port_display_rgb_cfg_t rgb_cfg = {
142:         .flags = {
143:             .bb_mode = true,
144:             .avoid_tearing = true,
145:         }};
146: 
147:     display_ = lvgl_port_add_disp_rgb(&display_cfg, &rgb_cfg);
148:     if (display_ == nullptr)
149:     {
150:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to add RGB display");
151:         return;
152:     }
153: 
154:     if (offset_x != 0 || offset_y != 0)
155:     {
156:         lv_display_set_offset(display_, offset_x, offset_y);
157:     }
158: 
159:     SetupUI();
160: }

162: MipiLcdDisplay::MipiLcdDisplay(esp_lcd_panel_io_handle_t panel_io, esp_lcd_panel_handle_t panel,
163:                                int width, int height, int offset_x, int offset_y,
164:                                bool mirror_x, bool mirror_y, bool swap_xy)
165:     : LcdDisplay(panel_io, panel, width, height)
166: {
167: 
168:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initialize LVGL library");
169:     lv_init();
170: 
171:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initialize LVGL port");
172:     lvgl_port_cfg_t port_cfg = ESP_LVGL_PORT_INIT_CONFIG();
173:     lvgl_port_init(&port_cfg);
174: 
175:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Adding LCD display");
176:     const lvgl_port_display_cfg_t disp_cfg = {
177:         .io_handle = panel_io,
178:         .panel_handle = panel,
179:         .control_handle = nullptr,
180:         .buffer_size = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_ * 50),
181:         .double_buffer = false,
182:         .hres = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_),
183:         .vres = static_cast<uint32_t>(height_),
184:         .monochrome = false,
185:         /* Rotation values must be same as used in esp_lcd for initial settings of the screen */
186:         .rotation = {
187:             .swap_xy = swap_xy,
188:             .mirror_x = mirror_x,
189:             .mirror_y = mirror_y,
190:         },
191:         .flags = {
192:             .buff_dma = true,
193:             .buff_spiram = false,
194:             .sw_rotate = true,
195:         },
196:     };
197: 
198:     const lvgl_port_display_dsi_cfg_t dpi_cfg = {
199:         .flags = {
200:             .avoid_tearing = false,
201:         }};
202:     display_ = lvgl_port_add_disp_dsi(&disp_cfg, &dpi_cfg);
203:     if (display_ == nullptr)
204:     {
205:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to add display");
206:         return;
207:     }
208: 
209:     if (offset_x != 0 || offset_y != 0)
210:     {
211:         lv_display_set_offset(display_, offset_x, offset_y);
212:     }
213: 
214:     SetupUI();
215: }

217: LcdDisplay::~LcdDisplay()
218: {
219:     SetPreviewImage(nullptr);
220: 
221:     // Clean up GIF controller
222:     if (gif_controller_)
223:     {
224:         gif_controller_->Stop();
225:         gif_controller_.reset();

233: 
234:     if (preview_image_ != nullptr)
235:     {
236:         lv_obj_del(preview_image_);
237:     }
238:     if (chat_message_label_ != nullptr)
239:     {
240:         lv_obj_del(chat_message_label_);
241:     }
242:     if (emoji_label_ != nullptr)
243:     {
244:         lv_obj_del(emoji_label_);
245:     }
246:     if (emoji_image_ != nullptr)
247:     {
248:         lv_obj_del(emoji_image_);
249:     }
250:     if (emoji_box_ != nullptr)
251:     {
252:         lv_obj_del(emoji_box_);
253:     }
254:     if (content_ != nullptr)
255:     {
256:         lv_obj_del(content_);
257:     }
258:     if (bottom_bar_ != nullptr)
259:     {
260:         lv_obj_del(bottom_bar_);
261:     }
262:     if (status_bar_ != nullptr)
263:     {
264:         lv_obj_del(status_bar_);
265:     }
266:     if (top_bar_ != nullptr)
267:     {
268:         lv_obj_del(top_bar_);
269:     }
270:     if (side_bar_ != nullptr)
271:     {
272:         lv_obj_del(side_bar_);
273:     }
274:     if (container_ != nullptr)
275:     {
276:         lv_obj_del(container_);
277:     }
278:     if (display_ != nullptr)
279:     {
280:         lv_display_delete(display_);
281:     }
282: 
283:     if (panel_ != nullptr)
284:     {
285:         esp_lcd_panel_del(panel_);
286:     }
287:     if (panel_io_ != nullptr)
288:     {
289:         esp_lcd_panel_io_del(panel_io_);
290:     }
291: }

303: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
304: void LcdDisplay::SetupUI()
305: {
306:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
307: 
308:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
309:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
310:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
311:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
312: 
313:     auto screen = lv_screen_active();
314:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
315:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
316:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(screen, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
317: 
318:     /* Container */
319:     container_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
320:     lv_obj_set_size(container_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_VER_RES);
321:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(container_, 0, 0);
322:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(container_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
323:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container_, 0, 0);
324:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container_, 0, 0);
325:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(container_, 0, 0);
326:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
327:     lv_obj_set_style_border_color(container_, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
328: 
329:     /* Layer 1: Top bar - for status icons */
330:     top_bar_ = lv_obj_create(container_);
331:     lv_obj_set_size(top_bar_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
332:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(top_bar_, 0, 0);
333:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0); // 50% opacity background
334:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
335:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(top_bar_, 0, 0);
336:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(top_bar_, 0, 0);
337:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
338:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
339:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_left(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
340:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_right(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
341:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
342:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_SPACE_BETWEEN, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
343:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(top_bar_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
344: 
345:     // Left icon
346:     network_label_ = lv_label_create(top_bar_);
347:     lv_label_set_text(network_label_, "");
348:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
349:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
350: 
351:     // Right icons container
352:     lv_obj_t *right_icons = lv_obj_create(top_bar_);
353:     lv_obj_set_size(right_icons, LV_SIZE_CONTENT, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
354:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(right_icons, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
355:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(right_icons, 0, 0);
356:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(right_icons, 0, 0);
357:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(right_icons, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
358:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(right_icons, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_END, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
359: 
360:     mute_label_ = lv_label_create(right_icons);
361:     lv_label_set_text(mute_label_, "");
362:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
363:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
364: 
365:     battery_label_ = lv_label_create(right_icons);
366:     lv_label_set_text(battery_label_, "");
367:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
368:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
369:     lv_obj_set_style_margin_left(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
370: 
371:     /* Layer 2: Status bar - for center text labels */
372:     status_bar_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
373:     lv_obj_set_size(status_bar_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
374:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(status_bar_, 0, 0);
375:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(status_bar_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0); // Transparent background
376:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(status_bar_, 0, 0);
377:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(status_bar_, 0, 0);
378:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(status_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
379:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(status_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
380:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(status_bar_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
381:     lv_obj_set_style_layout(status_bar_, LV_LAYOUT_NONE, 0); // Use absolute positioning
382:     lv_obj_align(status_bar_, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);       // Overlap with top_bar_
383: 
384:     notification_label_ = lv_label_create(status_bar_);
385:     lv_obj_set_width(notification_label_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.8);
386:     lv_obj_set_style_text_align(notification_label_, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
387:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
388:     lv_label_set_text(notification_label_, "");
389:     lv_obj_align(notification_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
390:     lv_obj_add_flag(notification_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
391: 
392:     status_label_ = lv_label_create(status_bar_);
393:     lv_obj_set_width(status_label_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.8);
394:     lv_label_set_long_mode(status_label_, LV_LABEL_LONG_SCROLL_CIRCULAR);
395:     lv_obj_set_style_text_align(status_label_, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
396:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
397:     lv_label_set_text(status_label_, Lang::Strings::INITIALIZING);
398:     lv_obj_align(status_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
399: 
400:     /* Content - Chat area */
401:     content_ = lv_obj_create(container_);
402:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(content_, 0, 0);
403:     lv_obj_set_width(content_, LV_HOR_RES);
404:     lv_obj_set_flex_grow(content_, 1);
405:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(content_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
406:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(content_, 0, 0);
407:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(content_, lvgl_theme->chat_background_color(), 0); // Background for chat area
408: 
409:     // Enable scrolling for chat content
410:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(content_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
411:     lv_obj_set_scroll_dir(content_, LV_DIR_VER);
412: 
413:     // Create a flex container for chat messages
414:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(content_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
415:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(content_, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START);
416:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(content_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0); // Space between messages
417: 
418:     // We'll create chat messages dynamically in SetChatMessage
419:     chat_message_label_ = nullptr;
420: 
421:     low_battery_popup_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
422:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(low_battery_popup_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
423:     lv_obj_set_size(low_battery_popup_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.9, text_font->line_height * 2);
424:     lv_obj_align(low_battery_popup_, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, -lvgl_theme->spacing(4));
425:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->low_battery_color(), 0);
426:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
427:     low_battery_label_ = lv_label_create(low_battery_popup_);
428:     lv_label_set_text(low_battery_label_, Lang::Strings::BATTERY_NEED_CHARGE);
429:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(low_battery_label_, lv_color_white(), 0);
430:     lv_obj_center(low_battery_label_);
431:     lv_obj_add_flag(low_battery_popup_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
432: 
433:     emoji_image_ = lv_img_create(screen);
434:     lv_obj_align(emoji_image_, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, text_font->line_height + lvgl_theme->spacing(8));
435: 
436:     // Display AI logo while booting
437:     emoji_label_ = lv_label_create(screen);
438:     lv_obj_center(emoji_label_);
439:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(emoji_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
440:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
441:     lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, FONT_AWESOME_MICROCHIP_AI);
442: }
443: #if CONFIG_IDF_TARGET_ESP32P4
444: #define MAX_MESSAGES 40
445: #else
446: #define MAX_MESSAGES 20
447: #endif
448: void LcdDisplay::SetChatMessage(const char *role, const char *content)
449: {
450:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
451:     if (content_ == nullptr)
452:     {
453:         return;
454:     }
455: 
456:     // Check if message count exceeds limit
457:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
458:     if (child_count >= MAX_MESSAGES)
459:     {
460:         // Delete the oldest message (first child object)
461:         lv_obj_t *first_child = lv_obj_get_child(content_, 0);
462:         lv_obj_t *last_child = lv_obj_get_child(content_, child_count - 1);
463:         if (first_child != nullptr)
464:         {
465:             lv_obj_del(first_child);
466:         }
467:         // Scroll to the last message immediately
468:         if (last_child != nullptr)
469:         {
470:             lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(last_child, LV_ANIM_OFF);
471:         }
472:     }
473: 
474:     // Collapse system messages (if it's a system message, check if the last message is also a system message)
475:     if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
476:     {
477:         if (child_count > 0)
478:         {
479:             // Get the last message container
480:             lv_obj_t *last_container = lv_obj_get_child(content_, child_count - 1);
481:             if (last_container != nullptr && lv_obj_get_child_cnt(last_container) > 0)
482:             {
483:                 // Get the bubble inside the container
484:                 lv_obj_t *last_bubble = lv_obj_get_child(last_container, 0);
485:                 if (last_bubble != nullptr)
486:                 {
487:                     // Check if bubble type is system message
488:                     void *bubble_type_ptr = lv_obj_get_user_data(last_bubble);
489:                     if (bubble_type_ptr != nullptr && strcmp((const char *)bubble_type_ptr, "system") == 0)
490:                     {
491:                         // If the last message is also a system message, delete it
492:                         lv_obj_del(last_container);
493:                     }
494:                 }
495:             }
496:         }
497:     }
498:     else
499:     {
500:         // Hide the centered AI logo
501:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
502:     }
503: 
504:     // Avoid empty message boxes
505:     if (strlen(content) == 0)
506:     {
507:         return;
508:     }
509: 
510:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
511:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
512: 
513:     // Create a message bubble
514:     lv_obj_t *msg_bubble = lv_obj_create(content_);
515:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(msg_bubble, 8, 0);
516:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(msg_bubble, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
517:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
518:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
519: 
520:     // Create the message text
521:     lv_obj_t *msg_text = lv_label_create(msg_bubble);
522:     lv_label_set_text(msg_text, content);
523: 
524:     // Calculate actual text width
525:     lv_coord_t text_width = lv_txt_get_width(content, strlen(content), text_font, 0);
526: 
527:     // Calculate bubble width
528:     lv_coord_t max_width = LV_HOR_RES * 85 / 100 - 16; // 85% of screen width
529:     lv_coord_t min_width = 20;
530:     lv_coord_t bubble_width;
531: 
532:     // Ensure text width is not less than minimum width
533:     if (text_width < min_width)
534:     {
535:         text_width = min_width;
536:     }
537: 
538:     // If text width is less than max width, use text width
539:     if (text_width < max_width)
540:     {
541:         bubble_width = text_width;
542:     }
543:     else
544:     {
545:         bubble_width = max_width;
546:     }
547: 
548:     // Set message text width
549:     lv_obj_set_width(msg_text, bubble_width); // Subtract padding
550:     lv_label_set_long_mode(msg_text, LV_LABEL_LONG_WRAP);
551: 
552:     // Set bubble width
553:     lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, bubble_width);
554:     lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
555: 
556:     // Set alignment and style based on message role
557:     if (strcmp(role, "user") == 0)
558:     {
559:         // User messages are right-aligned with green background
560:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->user_bubble_color(), 0);
561:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
562:         // Set text color for contrast
563:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
564: 
565:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
566:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"user");
567: 
568:         // Set appropriate width for content
569:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
570:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
571: 
572:         // Don't grow
573:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
574:     }
575:     else if (strcmp(role, "assistant") == 0)
576:     {
577:         // Assistant messages are left-aligned with white background
578:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
579:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
580:         // Set text color for contrast
581:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
582: 
583:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
584:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"assistant");
585: 
586:         // Set appropriate width for content
587:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
588:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
589: 
590:         // Don't grow
591:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
592:     }
593:     else if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
594:     {
595:         // System messages are center-aligned with light gray background
596:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
597:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
598:         // Set text color for contrast
599:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->system_text_color(), 0);
600: 
601:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
602:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"system");
603: 
604:         // Set appropriate width for content
605:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
606:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
607: 
608:         // Don't grow
609:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
610:     }
611: 
612:     // Create a full-width container for user messages to ensure right alignment
613:     if (strcmp(role, "user") == 0)
614:     {
615:         // Create a full-width container
616:         lv_obj_t *container = lv_obj_create(content_);
617:         lv_obj_set_width(container, LV_HOR_RES);
618:         lv_obj_set_height(container, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
619: 
620:         // Make container transparent and borderless
621:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
622:         lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container, 0, 0);
623:         lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container, 0, 0);
624: 
625:         // Move the message bubble into this container
626:         lv_obj_set_parent(msg_bubble, container);
627: 
628:         // Right align the bubble in the container
629:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_RIGHT_MID, -25, 0);
630: 
631:         // Auto-scroll to this container
632:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(container, LV_ANIM_ON);
633:     }
634:     else if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
635:     {
636:         // Create full-width container for system messages to ensure center alignment
637:         lv_obj_t *container = lv_obj_create(content_);
638:         lv_obj_set_width(container, LV_HOR_RES);
639:         lv_obj_set_height(container, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
640: 
641:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
642:         lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container, 0, 0);
643:         lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container, 0, 0);
644: 
645:         lv_obj_set_parent(msg_bubble, container);
646:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
647:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(container, LV_ANIM_ON);
648:     }
649:     else
650:     {
651:         // For assistant messages
652:         // Left align assistant messages
653:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
654: 
655:         // Auto-scroll to the message bubble
656:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(msg_bubble, LV_ANIM_ON);
657:     }
658: 
659:     // Store reference to the latest message label
660:     chat_message_label_ = msg_text;
661: }

663: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
664: {
665:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
666:     if (content_ == nullptr)
667:     {
668:         return;
669:     }
670: 
671:     if (image == nullptr)
672:     {
673:         return;
674:     }
675: 
676:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
677:     // Create a message bubble for image preview
678:     lv_obj_t *img_bubble = lv_obj_create(content_);
679:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(img_bubble, 8, 0);
680:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(img_bubble, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
681:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(img_bubble, 0, 0);
682:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
683: 
684:     // Set image bubble background color (similar to system message)
685:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
686:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(img_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
687: 
688:     // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
689:     lv_obj_set_user_data(img_bubble, (void *)"image");
690: 
691:     // Create the image object inside the bubble
692:     lv_obj_t *preview_image = lv_image_create(img_bubble);
693: 
694:     // Calculate appropriate size for the image
695:     lv_coord_t max_width = LV_HOR_RES * 70 / 100;  // 70% of screen width
696:     lv_coord_t max_height = LV_VER_RES * 50 / 100; // 50% of screen height
697: 
698:     // Calculate zoom factor to fit within maximum dimensions
699:     auto img_dsc = image->image_dsc();
700:     lv_coord_t img_width = img_dsc->header.w;
701:     lv_coord_t img_height = img_dsc->header.h;
702:     if (img_width == 0 || img_height == 0)
703:     {
704:         img_width = max_width;
705:         img_height = max_height;
706:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Invalid image dimensions: %ld x %ld, using default dimensions: %ld x %ld", img_width, img_height, max_width, max_height);
707:     }
708: 
709:     lv_coord_t zoom_w = (max_width * 256) / img_width;
710:     lv_coord_t zoom_h = (max_height * 256) / img_height;
711:     lv_coord_t zoom = (zoom_w < zoom_h) ? zoom_w : zoom_h;
712: 
713:     // Ensure zoom doesn't exceed 256 (100%)
714:     if (zoom > 256)
715:         zoom = 256;
716: 
717:     // Set image properties
718:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image, img_dsc);
719:     lv_image_set_scale(preview_image, zoom);
720: 
721:     // Add event handler to clean up LvglImage when image is deleted
722:     // We need to transfer ownership of the unique_ptr to the event callback
723:     LvglImage *raw_image = image.release(); // Release ownership of smart pointer
724:     lv_obj_add_event_cb(preview_image, [](lv_event_t *e)
725:                         {
726:         LvglImage* img = (LvglImage*)lv_event_get_user_data(e);
727:         if (img != nullptr) {
728:             delete img; // Properly release memory by deleting LvglImage object
729:         } }, LV_EVENT_DELETE, (void *)raw_image);
730: 
731:     // Calculate actual scaled image dimensions
732:     lv_coord_t scaled_width = (img_width * zoom) / 256;
733:     lv_coord_t scaled_height = (img_height * zoom) / 256;
734: 
735:     // Set bubble size to be 16 pixels larger than the image (8 pixels on each side)
736:     lv_obj_set_width(img_bubble, scaled_width + 16);
737:     lv_obj_set_height(img_bubble, scaled_height + 16);
738: 
739:     // Don't grow in flex layout
740:     lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(img_bubble, 0, 0);
741: 
742:     // Center the image within the bubble
743:     lv_obj_center(preview_image);
744: 
745:     // Left align the image bubble like assistant messages
746:     lv_obj_align(img_bubble, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
747: 
748:     // Auto-scroll to the image bubble
749:     lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(img_bubble, LV_ANIM_ON);
750: }

905: }

907: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
908: {
909:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
910:     if (preview_image_ == nullptr)
911:     {
912:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Preview image is not initialized");
913:         return;
914:     }
915: 
916:     if (image == nullptr)
917:     {
918:         esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
919:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_box_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
920:         lv_obj_add_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
921:         preview_image_cached_.reset();
922:         if (gif_controller_)
923:         {
924:             gif_controller_->Start();
925:         }
926:         return;
927:     }
928: 
929:     preview_image_cached_ = std::move(image);
930:     auto img_dsc = preview_image_cached_->image_dsc();
931:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image_, img_dsc);
932:     if (img_dsc->header.w > 0 && img_dsc->header.h > 0)
933:     {
934:         // zoom factor 0.5
935:         lv_image_set_scale(preview_image_, 128 * width_ / img_dsc->header.w);
936:     }
937: 
938:     // Hide emoji_box_
939:     if (gif_controller_)
940:     {
941:         gif_controller_->Stop();
942:     }
943:     lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_box_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
944:     lv_obj_remove_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
945:     esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
946:     ESP_ERROR_CHECK(esp_timer_start_once(preview_timer_, PREVIEW_IMAGE_DURATION_MS * 1000));
947: }

949: void LcdDisplay::SetChatMessage(const char *role, const char *content)
950: {

960: void LcdDisplay::SetEmotion(const char *emotion)
961: {
962:     // Stop any running GIF animation
963:     if (gif_controller_)
964:     {
965:         DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
966:         gif_controller_->Stop();
967:         gif_controller_.reset();
968:     }
969: 
970:     if (emoji_image_ == nullptr)
971:     {
972:         return;
973:     }
974: 
975:     auto emoji_collection = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_)->emoji_collection();
976:     auto image = emoji_collection != nullptr ? emoji_collection->GetEmojiImage(emotion) : nullptr;
977:     if (image == nullptr)
978:     {
979:         const char *utf8 = font_awesome_get_utf8(emotion);
980:         if (utf8 != nullptr && emoji_label_ != nullptr)
981:         {
982:             DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
983:             lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, utf8);
984:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
985:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
986:         }
987:         return;
988:     }
989: 
990:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
991:     if (image->IsGif())
992:     {
993:         // Create new GIF controller
994:         gif_controller_ = std::make_unique<LvglGif>(image->image_dsc());
995: 
996:         if (gif_controller_->IsLoaded())
997:         {
998:             // Set up frame update callback
999:             gif_controller_->SetFrameCallback([this]()
1000:                                               { lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc()); });
1001: 
1002:             // Set initial frame and start animation
1003:             lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc());
1004:             gif_controller_->Start();
1005: 
1006:             // Show GIF, hide others
1007:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1008:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1009:         }
1010:         else
1011:         {
1012:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to load GIF for emotion: %s", emotion);
1013:             gif_controller_.reset();
1014:         }
1015:     }
1016:     else
1017:     {
1018:         lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, image->image_dsc());
1019:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1020:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1021:     }
1022: 
1023: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
1024:     // In WeChat message style, if emotion is neutral, don't display it
1025:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
1026:     if (strcmp(emotion, "neutral") == 0 && child_count > 0)
1027:     {
1028:         // Stop GIF animation if running
1029:         if (gif_controller_)
1030:         {
1031:             gif_controller_->Stop();
1032:             gif_controller_.reset();
1033:         }
1034: 
1035:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1036:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1037:     }
1038: #endif
1039: }

1041: void LcdDisplay::SetTheme(Theme *theme)
1042: {
1043:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
1044: 
1045:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(theme);
1046: 
1047:     // Get the active screen
1048:     lv_obj_t *screen = lv_screen_active();
1049: 
1050:     // Set font
1051:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
1052:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
1053:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
1054: 
1055:     if (text_font->line_height >= 40)
1056:     {
1057:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1058:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1059:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1060:     }
1061:     else
1062:     {
1063:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
1064:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
1065:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
1066:     }
1067: 
1068:     // Set parent text color
1069:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
1070:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1071: 
1072:     // Set background image
1073:     if (lvgl_theme->background_image() != nullptr)
1074:     {
1075:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, lvgl_theme->background_image()->image_dsc(), 0);
1076:     }
1077:     else
1078:     {
1079:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, nullptr, 0);
1080:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1081:     }
1082: 
1083:     // Update top bar background color with 50% opacity
1084:     if (top_bar_ != nullptr)
1085:     {
1086:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
1087:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1088:     }
1089: 
1090:     // Update status bar elements
1091:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1092:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1093:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1094:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1095:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1096:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1097: 
1098:     // If we have the chat message style, update all message bubbles
1099: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
1100:     // Set content background opacity
1101:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(content_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
1102: 
1103:     // Iterate through all children of content (message containers or bubbles)
1104:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
1105:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < child_count; i++)
1106:     {
1107:         lv_obj_t *obj = lv_obj_get_child(content_, i);
1108:         if (obj == nullptr)
1109:             continue;
1110: 
1111:         lv_obj_t *bubble = nullptr;
1112: 
1113:         // Check if this object is a container or bubble
1114:         // If it's a container (user or system message), get its child as bubble
1115:         // If it's a bubble (assistant message), use it directly
1116:         if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(obj) > 0)
1117:         {
1118:             // Might be a container, check if it's a user or system message container
1119:             // User and system message containers are transparent
1120:             lv_opa_t bg_opa = lv_obj_get_style_bg_opa(obj, 0);
1121:             if (bg_opa == LV_OPA_TRANSP)
1122:             {
1123:                 // This is a user or system message container
1124:                 bubble = lv_obj_get_child(obj, 0);
1125:             }
1126:             else
1127:             {
1128:                 // This might be an assistant message bubble itself
1129:                 bubble = obj;
1130:             }
1131:         }
1132:         else
1133:         {
1134:             // No child elements, might be other UI elements, skip
1135:             continue;
1136:         }
1137: 
1138:         if (bubble == nullptr)
1139:             continue;
1140: 
1141:         // Use saved user data to identify bubble type
1142:         void *bubble_type_ptr = lv_obj_get_user_data(bubble);
1143:         if (bubble_type_ptr != nullptr)
1144:         {
1145:             const char *bubble_type = static_cast<const char *>(bubble_type_ptr);
1146: 
1147:             // Apply correct color based on bubble type
1148:             if (strcmp(bubble_type, "user") == 0)
1149:             {
1150:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->user_bubble_color(), 0);
1151:             }
1152:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "assistant") == 0)
1153:             {
1154:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
1155:             }
1156:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
1157:             {
1158:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
1159:             }
1160:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "image") == 0)
1161:             {
1162:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
1163:             }
1164: 
1165:             // Update border color
1166:             lv_obj_set_style_border_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
1167: 
1168:             // Update text color for the message
1169:             if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(bubble) > 0)
1170:             {
1171:                 lv_obj_t *text = lv_obj_get_child(bubble, 0);
1172:                 if (text != nullptr)
1173:                 {
1174:                     // Set text color based on bubble type
1175:                     if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
1176:                     {
1177:                         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(text, lvgl_theme->system_text_color(), 0);
1178:                     }
1179:                     else
1180:                     {
1181:                         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1182:                     }
1183:                 }
1184:             }
1185:         }
1186:         else
1187:         {
1188:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "child[%lu] Bubble type is not found", i);
1189:         }
1190:     }
1191: #else
1192:     // Simple UI mode - just update the main chat message
1193:     if (chat_message_label_ != nullptr)
1194:     {
1195:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(chat_message_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1196:     }
1197: 
1198:     if (emoji_label_ != nullptr)
1199:     {
1200:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1201:     }
1202: 
1203:     // Update bottom bar background color with 50% opacity
1204:     if (bottom_bar_ != nullptr)
1205:     {
1206:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(bottom_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
1207:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bottom_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1208:     }
1209: #endif
1210: 
1211:     // Update low battery popup
1212:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->low_battery_color(), 0);
1213: 
1214:     // No errors occurred. Save theme to settings
1215:     Display::SetTheme(lvgl_theme);
1216: }

The `SpiLcdDisplay` constructor initializes and configures an SPI-based LCD display for use with the LVGL graphics library. It sets up the display hardware, clears the screen to white, enables the display, initializes LVGL with optional PSRAM caching, and registers the display with LVGL for rendering UI elements. The function also applies display orientation settings and offsets as specified.

qualitative.analysis:
The generated code follows a similar structure and logic to the ground truth but omits several important steps that affect both correctness and completeness.

Semantic Correctness:
- Both versions initialize LVGL, configure display settings, and call SetupUI().
- However, the generated version lacks critical initialization steps:
  * It does not turn on the display via `esp_lcd_panel_disp_on_off`, which may leave the display inactive.
  * PSRAM-based image cache configuration is missing, potentially affecting performance on devices with SPIRAM.
  * Affinity setting for multi-core systems is omitted.
- Some flag differences could lead to different rendering behavior or performance characteristics.

Structure Similarity:
- Function signature matches exactly.
- Control flow is largely preserved: draw initial screen, initialize LVGL, set up port/display, apply offsets, run UI setup.
- Key API usage such as `lvgl_port_init`, `lvgl_port_add_disp` is maintained.
- Minor structural differences include an added field `.timer_period_ms` in port config (not necessarily incorrect), and reordering of some log messages.

Functional Completeness:
- Missing major functional blocks:
  * Display power-on sequence (`esp_lcd_panel_disp_on_off`)
  * Optional PSRAM cache resizing based on available memory
  * Core affinity configuration for SMP systems
  * Several fields in the display configuration are either missing or incorrectly set:
    - `.control_handle`, `.trans_size`, `.monochrome`, and `.color_format` are absent
    - Flag settings like `.buff_spiram`, `.sw_rotate`, `.swap_bytes`, `.full_refresh`, `.direct_mode` differ significantly from recommended values
- These omissions can impact hardware compatibility, performance, and feature support.

Overall, while the core idea is captured and basic functionality might work, the absence of platform-specific optimizations and safety checks lowers its reliability compared to the reference implementation.

215:         /* Rotation values must be same as used in esp_lcd for initial settings of the screen */
216:         .rotation = {
217:             .swap_xy = swap_xy,
218:             .mirror_x = mirror_x,
219:             .mirror_y = mirror_y,
220:         },
221:         .flags = {
222:             .buff_dma = true,
223:             .buff_spiram = false,
224:             .sw_rotate = true,
225:         },
226:     };
227: 
228:     const lvgl_port_display_dsi_cfg_t dpi_cfg = {
229:         .flags = {
230:             .avoid_tearing = false,
231:         }};
232:     display_ = lvgl_port_add_disp_dsi(&disp_cfg, &dpi_cfg);
233:     if (display_ == nullptr)
234:     {
235:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to add display");
236:         return;
237:     }
238: 
239:     if (offset_x != 0 || offset_y != 0)
240:     {
241:         lv_display_set_offset(display_, offset_x, offset_y);
242:     }
243: 
244:     SetupUI();
245: }

333: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
334: void LcdDisplay::SetupUI()
335: {
336:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
337: 
338:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
339:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
340:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
341:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
342: 
343:     auto screen = lv_screen_active();
344:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
345:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
346:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(screen, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
347: 
348:     /* Container */
349:     container_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
350:     lv_obj_set_size(container_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_VER_RES);
351:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(container_, 0, 0);
352:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(container_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
353:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container_, 0, 0);
354:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container_, 0, 0);
355:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(container_, 0, 0);
356:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
357:     lv_obj_set_style_border_color(container_, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
358: 
359:     /* Layer 1: Top bar - for status icons */
360:     top_bar_ = lv_obj_create(container_);
361:     lv_obj_set_size(top_bar_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
362:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(top_bar_, 0, 0);
363:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0); // 50% opacity background
364:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
365:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(top_bar_, 0, 0);
366:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(top_bar_, 0, 0);
367:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
368:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
369:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_left(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
370:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_right(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
371:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
372:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_SPACE_BETWEEN, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
373:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(top_bar_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
374: 
375:     // Left icon
376:     network_label_ = lv_label_create(top_bar_);
377:     lv_label_set_text(network_label_, "");
378:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
379:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
380: 
381:     // Right icons container
382:     lv_obj_t *right_icons = lv_obj_create(top_bar_);
383:     lv_obj_set_size(right_icons, LV_SIZE_CONTENT, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
384:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(right_icons, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
385:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(right_icons, 0, 0);
386:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(right_icons, 0, 0);
387:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(right_icons, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
388:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(right_icons, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_END, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
389: 
390:     mute_label_ = lv_label_create(right_icons);
391:     lv_label_set_text(mute_label_, "");
392:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
393:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
394: 
395:     battery_label_ = lv_label_create(right_icons);
396:     lv_label_set_text(battery_label_, "");
397:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
398:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
399:     lv_obj_set_style_margin_left(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
400: 
401:     /* Layer 2: Status bar - for center text labels */
402:     status_bar_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
403:     lv_obj_set_size(status_bar_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
404:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(status_bar_, 0, 0);
405:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(status_bar_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0); // Transparent background
406:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(status_bar_, 0, 0);
407:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(status_bar_, 0, 0);
408:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(status_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
409:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(status_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
410:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(status_bar_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
411:     lv_obj_set_style_layout(status_bar_, LV_LAYOUT_NONE, 0); // Use absolute positioning
412:     lv_obj_align(status_bar_, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);       // Overlap with top_bar_
413: 
414:     notification_label_ = lv_label_create(status_bar_);
415:     lv_obj_set_width(notification_label_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.8);
416:     lv_obj_set_style_text_align(notification_label_, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
417:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
418:     lv_label_set_text(notification_label_, "");
419:     lv_obj_align(notification_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
420:     lv_obj_add_flag(notification_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
421: 
422:     status_label_ = lv_label_create(status_bar_);
423:     lv_obj_set_width(status_label_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.8);
424:     lv_label_set_long_mode(status_label_, LV_LABEL_LONG_SCROLL_CIRCULAR);
425:     lv_obj_set_style_text_align(status_label_, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
426:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
427:     lv_label_set_text(status_label_, Lang::Strings::INITIALIZING);
428:     lv_obj_align(status_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
429: 
430:     /* Content - Chat area */
431:     content_ = lv_obj_create(container_);
432:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(content_, 0, 0);
433:     lv_obj_set_width(content_, LV_HOR_RES);
434:     lv_obj_set_flex_grow(content_, 1);
435:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(content_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
436:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(content_, 0, 0);
437:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(content_, lvgl_theme->chat_background_color(), 0); // Background for chat area
438: 
439:     // Enable scrolling for chat content
440:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(content_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
441:     lv_obj_set_scroll_dir(content_, LV_DIR_VER);
442: 
443:     // Create a flex container for chat messages
444:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(content_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
445:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(content_, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START);
446:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(content_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0); // Space between messages
447: 
448:     // We'll create chat messages dynamically in SetChatMessage
449:     chat_message_label_ = nullptr;
450: 
451:     low_battery_popup_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
452:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(low_battery_popup_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
453:     lv_obj_set_size(low_battery_popup_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.9, text_font->line_height * 2);
454:     lv_obj_align(low_battery_popup_, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, -lvgl_theme->spacing(4));
455:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->low_battery_color(), 0);
456:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
457:     low_battery_label_ = lv_label_create(low_battery_popup_);
458:     lv_label_set_text(low_battery_label_, Lang::Strings::BATTERY_NEED_CHARGE);
459:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(low_battery_label_, lv_color_white(), 0);
460:     lv_obj_center(low_battery_label_);
461:     lv_obj_add_flag(low_battery_popup_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
462: 
463:     emoji_image_ = lv_img_create(screen);
464:     lv_obj_align(emoji_image_, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, text_font->line_height + lvgl_theme->spacing(8));
465: 
466:     // Display AI logo while booting
467:     emoji_label_ = lv_label_create(screen);
468:     lv_obj_center(emoji_label_);
469:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(emoji_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
470:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
471:     lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, FONT_AWESOME_MICROCHIP_AI);
472: }
473: #if CONFIG_IDF_TARGET_ESP32P4
474: #define MAX_MESSAGES 40
475: #else
476: #define MAX_MESSAGES 20
477: #endif
478: void LcdDisplay::SetChatMessage(const char *role, const char *content)
479: {
480:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
481:     if (content_ == nullptr)
482:     {
483:         return;
484:     }
485: 
486:     // Check if message count exceeds limit
487:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
488:     if (child_count >= MAX_MESSAGES)
489:     {
490:         // Delete the oldest message (first child object)
491:         lv_obj_t *first_child = lv_obj_get_child(content_, 0);
492:         lv_obj_t *last_child = lv_obj_get_child(content_, child_count - 1);
493:         if (first_child != nullptr)
494:         {
495:             lv_obj_del(first_child);
496:         }
497:         // Scroll to the last message immediately
498:         if (last_child != nullptr)
499:         {
500:             lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(last_child, LV_ANIM_OFF);
501:         }
502:     }
503: 
504:     // Collapse system messages (if it's a system message, check if the last message is also a system message)
505:     if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
506:     {
507:         if (child_count > 0)
508:         {
509:             // Get the last message container
510:             lv_obj_t *last_container = lv_obj_get_child(content_, child_count - 1);
511:             if (last_container != nullptr && lv_obj_get_child_cnt(last_container) > 0)
512:             {
513:                 // Get the bubble inside the container
514:                 lv_obj_t *last_bubble = lv_obj_get_child(last_container, 0);
515:                 if (last_bubble != nullptr)
516:                 {
517:                     // Check if bubble type is system message
518:                     void *bubble_type_ptr = lv_obj_get_user_data(last_bubble);
519:                     if (bubble_type_ptr != nullptr && strcmp((const char *)bubble_type_ptr, "system") == 0)
520:                     {
521:                         // If the last message is also a system message, delete it
522:                         lv_obj_del(last_container);
523:                     }
524:                 }
525:             }
526:         }
527:     }
528:     else
529:     {
530:         // Hide the centered AI logo
531:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
532:     }
533: 
534:     // Avoid empty message boxes
535:     if (strlen(content) == 0)
536:     {
537:         return;
538:     }
539: 
540:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
541:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
542: 
543:     // Create a message bubble
544:     lv_obj_t *msg_bubble = lv_obj_create(content_);
545:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(msg_bubble, 8, 0);
546:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(msg_bubble, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
547:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
548:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
549: 
550:     // Create the message text
551:     lv_obj_t *msg_text = lv_label_create(msg_bubble);
552:     lv_label_set_text(msg_text, content);
553: 
554:     // Calculate actual text width
555:     lv_coord_t text_width = lv_txt_get_width(content, strlen(content), text_font, 0);
556: 
557:     // Calculate bubble width
558:     lv_coord_t max_width = LV_HOR_RES * 85 / 100 - 16; // 85% of screen width
559:     lv_coord_t min_width = 20;
560:     lv_coord_t bubble_width;
561: 
562:     // Ensure text width is not less than minimum width
563:     if (text_width < min_width)
564:     {
565:         text_width = min_width;
566:     }
567: 
568:     // If text width is less than max width, use text width
569:     if (text_width < max_width)
570:     {
571:         bubble_width = text_width;
572:     }
573:     else
574:     {
575:         bubble_width = max_width;
576:     }
577: 
578:     // Set message text width
579:     lv_obj_set_width(msg_text, bubble_width); // Subtract padding
580:     lv_label_set_long_mode(msg_text, LV_LABEL_LONG_WRAP);
581: 
582:     // Set bubble width
583:     lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, bubble_width);
584:     lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
585: 
586:     // Set alignment and style based on message role
587:     if (strcmp(role, "user") == 0)
588:     {
589:         // User messages are right-aligned with green background
590:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->user_bubble_color(), 0);
591:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
592:         // Set text color for contrast
593:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
594: 
595:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
596:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"user");
597: 
598:         // Set appropriate width for content
599:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
600:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
601: 
602:         // Don't grow
603:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
604:     }
605:     else if (strcmp(role, "assistant") == 0)
606:     {
607:         // Assistant messages are left-aligned with white background
608:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
609:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
610:         // Set text color for contrast
611:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
612: 
613:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
614:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"assistant");
615: 
616:         // Set appropriate width for content
617:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
618:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
619: 
620:         // Don't grow
621:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
622:     }
623:     else if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
624:     {
625:         // System messages are center-aligned with light gray background
626:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
627:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
628:         // Set text color for contrast
629:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->system_text_color(), 0);
630: 
631:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
632:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"system");
633: 
634:         // Set appropriate width for content
635:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
636:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
637: 
638:         // Don't grow
639:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
640:     }
641: 
642:     // Create a full-width container for user messages to ensure right alignment
643:     if (strcmp(role, "user") == 0)
644:     {
645:         // Create a full-width container
646:         lv_obj_t *container = lv_obj_create(content_);
647:         lv_obj_set_width(container, LV_HOR_RES);
648:         lv_obj_set_height(container, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
649: 
650:         // Make container transparent and borderless
651:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
652:         lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container, 0, 0);
653:         lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container, 0, 0);
654: 
655:         // Move the message bubble into this container
656:         lv_obj_set_parent(msg_bubble, container);
657: 
658:         // Right align the bubble in the container
659:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_RIGHT_MID, -25, 0);
660: 
661:         // Auto-scroll to this container
662:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(container, LV_ANIM_ON);
663:     }
664:     else if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
665:     {
666:         // Create full-width container for system messages to ensure center alignment
667:         lv_obj_t *container = lv_obj_create(content_);
668:         lv_obj_set_width(container, LV_HOR_RES);
669:         lv_obj_set_height(container, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
670: 
671:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
672:         lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container, 0, 0);
673:         lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container, 0, 0);
674: 
675:         lv_obj_set_parent(msg_bubble, container);
676:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
677:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(container, LV_ANIM_ON);
678:     }
679:     else
680:     {
681:         // For assistant messages
682:         // Left align assistant messages
683:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
684: 
685:         // Auto-scroll to the message bubble
686:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(msg_bubble, LV_ANIM_ON);
687:     }
688: 
689:     // Store reference to the latest message label
690:     chat_message_label_ = msg_text;
691: }
692: 
693: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
694: {
695:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
696:     if (content_ == nullptr)
697:     {
698:         return;
699:     }
700: 
701:     if (image == nullptr)
702:     {
703:         return;
704:     }
705: 
706:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
707:     // Create a message bubble for image preview
708:     lv_obj_t *img_bubble = lv_obj_create(content_);
709:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(img_bubble, 8, 0);
710:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(img_bubble, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
711:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(img_bubble, 0, 0);
712:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
713: 
714:     // Set image bubble background color (similar to system message)
715:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
716:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(img_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
717: 
718:     // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
719:     lv_obj_set_user_data(img_bubble, (void *)"image");
720: 
721:     // Create the image object inside the bubble
722:     lv_obj_t *preview_image = lv_image_create(img_bubble);
723: 
724:     // Calculate appropriate size for the image
725:     lv_coord_t max_width = LV_HOR_RES * 70 / 100;  // 70% of screen width
726:     lv_coord_t max_height = LV_VER_RES * 50 / 100; // 50% of screen height
727: 
728:     // Calculate zoom factor to fit within maximum dimensions
729:     auto img_dsc = image->image_dsc();
730:     lv_coord_t img_width = img_dsc->header.w;
731:     lv_coord_t img_height = img_dsc->header.h;
732:     if (img_width == 0 || img_height == 0)
733:     {
734:         img_width = max_width;
735:         img_height = max_height;
736:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Invalid image dimensions: %ld x %ld, using default dimensions: %ld x %ld", img_width, img_height, max_width, max_height);
737:     }
738: 
739:     lv_coord_t zoom_w = (max_width * 256) / img_width;
740:     lv_coord_t zoom_h = (max_height * 256) / img_height;
741:     lv_coord_t zoom = (zoom_w < zoom_h) ? zoom_w : zoom_h;
742: 
743:     // Ensure zoom doesn't exceed 256 (100%)
744:     if (zoom > 256)
745:         zoom = 256;
746: 
747:     // Set image properties
748:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image, img_dsc);
749:     lv_image_set_scale(preview_image, zoom);
750: 
751:     // Add event handler to clean up LvglImage when image is deleted
752:     // We need to transfer ownership of the unique_ptr to the event callback
753:     LvglImage *raw_image = image.release(); // Release ownership of smart pointer
754:     lv_obj_add_event_cb(preview_image, [](lv_event_t *e)
755:                         {
756:         LvglImage* img = (LvglImage*)lv_event_get_user_data(e);
757:         if (img != nullptr) {
758:             delete img; // Properly release memory by deleting LvglImage object
759:         } }, LV_EVENT_DELETE, (void *)raw_image);
760: 
761:     // Calculate actual scaled image dimensions
762:     lv_coord_t scaled_width = (img_width * zoom) / 256;
763:     lv_coord_t scaled_height = (img_height * zoom) / 256;
764: 
765:     // Set bubble size to be 16 pixels larger than the image (8 pixels on each side)
766:     lv_obj_set_width(img_bubble, scaled_width + 16);
767:     lv_obj_set_height(img_bubble, scaled_height + 16);
768: 
769:     // Don't grow in flex layout
770:     lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(img_bubble, 0, 0);
771: 
772:     // Center the image within the bubble
773:     lv_obj_center(preview_image);
774: 
775:     // Left align the image bubble like assistant messages
776:     lv_obj_align(img_bubble, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
777: 
778:     // Auto-scroll to the image bubble
779:     lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(img_bubble, LV_ANIM_ON);
780: }
781: #else

937: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
938: {
939:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
940:     if (preview_image_ == nullptr)
941:     {
942:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Preview image is not initialized");
943:         return;
944:     }
945: 
946:     if (image == nullptr)
947:     {
948:         esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
949:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_box_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
950:         lv_obj_add_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
951:         preview_image_cached_.reset();
952:         if (gif_controller_)
953:         {
954:             gif_controller_->Start();
955:         }
956:         return;
957:     }
958: 
959:     preview_image_cached_ = std::move(image);
960:     auto img_dsc = preview_image_cached_->image_dsc();
961:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image_, img_dsc);
962:     if (img_dsc->header.w > 0 && img_dsc->header.h > 0)
963:     {
964:         // zoom factor 0.5
965:         lv_image_set_scale(preview_image_, 128 * width_ / img_dsc->header.w);
966:     }
967: 
968:     // Hide emoji_box_
969:     if (gif_controller_)
970:     {
971:         gif_controller_->Stop();
972:     }
973:     lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_box_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
974:     lv_obj_remove_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
975:     esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
976:     ESP_ERROR_CHECK(esp_timer_start_once(preview_timer_, PREVIEW_IMAGE_DURATION_MS * 1000));
977: }
