1060: void LcdDisplay::SetTheme(Theme *theme)
1061: {
1062:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
1063: 
1064:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(theme);
1065: 
1066:     // Get the active screen
1067:     lv_obj_t *screen = lv_screen_active();
1068: 
1069:     // Set font
1070:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
1071:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
1072:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
1073: 
1074:     if (text_font->line_height >= 40)
1075:     {
1076:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1077:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1078:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1079:     }
1080:     else
1081:     {
1082:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
1083:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
1084:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
1085:     }
1086: 
1087:     // Set parent text color
1088:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
1089:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1090: 
1091:     // Set background image
1092:     if (lvgl_theme->background_image() != nullptr)
1093:     {
1094:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, lvgl_theme->background_image()->image_dsc(), 0);
1095:     }
1096:     else
1097:     {
1098:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, nullptr, 0);
1099:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1100:     }
1101: 
1102:     // Update top bar background color with 50% opacity
1103:     if (top_bar_ != nullptr)
1104:     {
1105:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
1106:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1107:     }
1108: 
1109:     // Update status bar elements
1110:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1111:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1112:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1113:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1114:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1115:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1116: 
1117:     // If we have the chat message style, update all message bubbles
1118: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
1119:     // Set content background opacity
1120:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(content_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
1121: 
1122:     // Iterate through all children of content (message containers or bubbles)
1123:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
1124:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < child_count; i++)
1125:     {
1126:         lv_obj_t *obj = lv_obj_get_child(content_, i);
1127:         if (obj == nullptr)
1128:             continue;
1129: 
1130:         lv_obj_t *bubble = nullptr;
1131: 
1132:         // Check if this object is a container or bubble
1133:         // If it's a container (user or system message), get its child as bubble
1134:         // If it's a bubble (assistant message), use it directly
1135:         if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(obj) > 0)
1136:         {
1137:             // Might be a container, check if it's a user or system message container
1138:             // User and system message containers are transparent
1139:             lv_opa_t bg_opa = lv_obj_get_style_bg_opa(obj, 0);
1140:             if (bg_opa == LV_OPA_TRANSP)
1141:             {
1142:                 // This is a user or system message container
1143:                 bubble = lv_obj_get_child(obj, 0);
1144:             }
1145:             else
1146:             {
1147:                 // This might be an assistant message bubble itself
1148:                 bubble = obj;
1149:             }
1150:         }
1151:         else
1152:         {
1153:             // No child elements, might be other UI elements, skip
1154:             continue;
1155:         }
1156: 
1157:         if (bubble == nullptr)
1158:             continue;
1159: 
1160:         // Use saved user data to identify bubble type
1161:         void *bubble_type_ptr = lv_obj_get_user_data(bubble);
1162:         if (bubble_type_ptr != nullptr)
1163:         {
1164:             const char *bubble_type = static_cast<const char *>(bubble_type_ptr);
1165: 
1166:             // Apply correct color based on bubble type
1167:             if (strcmp(bubble_type, "user") == 0)
1168:             {
1169:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->user_bubble_color(), 0);
1170:             }
1171:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "assistant") == 0)
1172:             {
1173:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
1174:             }
1175:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
1176:             {
1177:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
1178:             }
1179:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "image") == 0)
1180:             {
1181:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
1182:             }
1183: 
1184:             // Update border color
1185:             lv_obj_set_style_border_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
1186: 
1187:             // Update text color for the message
1188:             if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(bubble) > 0)
1189:             {
1190:                 lv_obj_t *text = lv_obj_get_child(bubble, 0);
1191:                 if (text != nullptr)
1192:                 {
1193:                     // Set text color based on bubble type
1194:                     if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
1195:                     {
1196:                         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(text, lvgl_theme->system_text_color(), 0);
1197:                     }
1198:                     else
1199:                     {
1200:                         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1201:                     }
1202:                 }
1203:             }
1204:         }
1205:         else
1206:         {
1207:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "child[%lu] Bubble type is not found", i);
1208:         }
1209:     }
1210: #else
1211:     // Simple UI mode - just update the main chat message
1212:     if (chat_message_label_ != nullptr)
1213:     {
1214:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(chat_message_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1215:     }
1216: 
1217:     if (emoji_label_ != nullptr)
1218:     {
1219:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1220:     }
1221: 
1222:     // Update bottom bar background color with 50% opacity
1223:     if (bottom_bar_ != nullptr)
1224:     {
1225:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(bottom_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
1226:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bottom_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1227:     }
1228: #endif
1229: 
1230:     // Update low battery popup
1231:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->low_battery_color(), 0);
1232: 
1233:     // No errors occurred. Save theme to settings
1234:     Display::SetTheme(lvgl_theme);
1235: }

The `LcdDisplay` destructor cleans up all allocated display resources, including stopping and deleting the GIF controller, removing UI elements (such as images, labels, bars, and containers) from the screen, and deallocating the underlying LCD panel and panel IO drivers. It ensures proper shutdown of the display system and prevents memory leaks by releasing all associated objects and timers.

qualitative.analysis:
Semantic Correctness:
- The generated code correctly implements the destructor logic for cleaning up resources.
- It properly handles the GIF controller stop and reset, which matches the ground truth.
- However, it does not call `SetPreviewImage(nullptr)` as in the ground truth, potentially leading to dangling pointer issues.
- The order of cleanup differs slightly but doesn't appear to introduce semantic errors.

Structure Similarity:
- Function signature and overall control flow are consistent with the ground truth.
- Both use null checks before deleting objects.
- Differences include:
  * The generated version uses `lv_obj_clean()` before `lv_obj_del()`, which is absent in the ground truth.
  * Different ordering of object deletion.
  * Inclusion of additional UI elements (e.g., network_label_, low_battery_popup_) not present in the ground truth.

Functional Completeness:
- Most core functionality from the ground truth is covered:
  * GIF controller cleanup.
  * Timer deletion (though missing esp_timer_stop).
  * Deletion of major UI components like top_bar_, content_, container_, etc.
- Missing elements compared to ground truth:
  * No call to `SetPreviewImage(nullptr)`.
  * Missing cleanup for `display_` (`lv_display_delete`) and hardware-related deletions (`esp_lcd_panel_del`, `esp_lcd_panel_io_del`).
  * Lacks `esp_timer_stop()` before `esp_timer_delete()`, which could lead to unsafe timer deletion.
- Additional elements in generated code that aren't in ground truth may indicate over-generation or different class design assumptions.

Overall, while the general approach is correct and many details match, there are notable omissions and additions that prevent full alignment with the reference implementation.

results.description: The `LcdDisplay::SetupUI` function initializes and configures the user interface layout for the LCD display using the LVGL graphics library. It sets up a full-screen container with a top bar for status icons (network, mute, battery) and applies styling based on the current theme, including fonts, colors, and spacing. This function establishes the visual structure and appearance of the device's main display interface.

214:         .panel_handle = panel_,
215:         .buffer_size = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_ * 20),
216:         .double_buffer = true,
217:         .hres = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_),
218:         .vres = static_cast<uint32_t>(height_),
219:         .rotation = {
220:             .swap_xy = swap_xy,
221:             .mirror_x = mirror_x,
222:             .mirror_y = mirror_y,
223:         },
224:         .flags = {
225:             .buff_dma = 1,
226:             .swap_bytes = 0,
227:             .full_refresh = 1,
228:             .direct_mode = 1,
229:         },
230:     };
231: 
232:     const lvgl_port_display_rgb_cfg_t rgb_cfg = {
233:         .flags = {
234:             .bb_mode = true,
235:             .avoid_tearing = true,
236:         }};
237: 
238:     display_ = lvgl_port_add_disp_rgb(&display_cfg, &rgb_cfg);
239:     if (display_ == nullptr)
240:     {
241:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to add RGB display");
242:         return;
243:     }
244: 
245:     if (offset_x != 0 || offset_y != 0)
246:     {
247:         lv_display_set_offset(display_, offset_x, offset_y);
248:     }
249: 
250:     SetupUI();
251: }

253: MipiLcdDisplay::MipiLcdDisplay(esp_lcd_panel_io_handle_t panel_io, esp_lcd_panel_handle_t panel,
254:                                int width, int height, int offset_x, int offset_y,
255:                                bool mirror_x, bool mirror_y, bool swap_xy)
256:     : LcdDisplay(panel_io, panel, width, height)
257: {
258: 
259:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initialize LVGL library");
260:     lv_init();
261: 
262:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initialize LVGL port");
263:     lvgl_port_cfg_t port_cfg = ESP_LVGL_PORT_INIT_CONFIG();
264:     lvgl_port_init(&port_cfg);
265: 
266:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Adding LCD display");
267:     const lvgl_port_display_cfg_t disp_cfg = {
268:         .io_handle = panel_io,
269:         .panel_handle = panel,
270:         .control_handle = nullptr,
271:         .buffer_size = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_ * 50),
272:         .double_buffer = false,
273:         .hres = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_),
274:         .vres = static_cast<uint32_t>(height_),
275:         .monochrome = false,
276:         /* Rotation values must be same as used in esp_lcd for initial settings of the screen */
277:         .rotation = {
278:             .swap_xy = swap_xy,
279:             .mirror_x = mirror_x,
280:             .mirror_y = mirror_y,
281:         },
282:         .flags = {
283:             .buff_dma = true,
284:             .buff_spiram = false,
285:             .sw_rotate = true,
286:         },
287:     };
288: 
289:     const lvgl_port_display_dsi_cfg_t dpi_cfg = {
290:         .flags = {
291:             .avoid_tearing = false,
292:         }};
293:     display_ = lvgl_port_add_disp_dsi(&disp_cfg, &dpi_cfg);
294:     if (display_ == nullptr)
295:     {
296:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to add display");
297:         return;
298:     }
299: 
300:     if (offset_x != 0 || offset_y != 0)
301:     {
302:         lv_display_set_offset(display_, offset_x, offset_y);
303:     }
304: 
305:     SetupUI();
306: }

394: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
395: void LcdDisplay::SetupUI()

398: #if CONFIG_IDF_TARGET_ESP32P4
399: #define MAX_MESSAGES 40
400: #else
401: #define MAX_MESSAGES 20
402: #endif
403: void LcdDisplay::SetChatMessage(const char *role, const char *content)
404: {
405:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
406:     if (content_ == nullptr)
407:     {
408:         return;
409:     }
410: 
411:     // Check if message count exceeds limit
412:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
413:     if (child_count >= MAX_MESSAGES)
414:     {
415:         // Delete the oldest message (first child object)
416:         lv_obj_t *first_child = lv_obj_get_child(content_, 0);
417:         lv_obj_t *last_child = lv_obj_get_child(content_, child_count - 1);
418:         if (first_child != nullptr)
419:         {
420:             lv_obj_del(first_child);
421:         }
422:         // Scroll to the last message immediately
423:         if (last_child != nullptr)
424:         {
425:             lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(last_child, LV_ANIM_OFF);
426:         }
427:     }
428: 
429:     // Collapse system messages (if it's a system message, check if the last message is also a system message)
430:     if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
431:     {
432:         if (child_count > 0)
433:         {
434:             // Get the last message container
435:             lv_obj_t *last_container = lv_obj_get_child(content_, child_count - 1);
436:             if (last_container != nullptr && lv_obj_get_child_cnt(last_container) > 0)
437:             {
438:                 // Get the bubble inside the container
439:                 lv_obj_t *last_bubble = lv_obj_get_child(last_container, 0);
440:                 if (last_bubble != nullptr)
441:                 {
442:                     // Check if bubble type is system message
443:                     void *bubble_type_ptr = lv_obj_get_user_data(last_bubble);
444:                     if (bubble_type_ptr != nullptr && strcmp((const char *)bubble_type_ptr, "system") == 0)
445:                     {
446:                         // If the last message is also a system message, delete it
447:                         lv_obj_del(last_container);
448:                     }
449:                 }
450:             }
451:         }
452:     }
453:     else
454:     {
455:         // Hide the centered AI logo
456:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
457:     }
458: 
459:     // Avoid empty message boxes
460:     if (strlen(content) == 0)
461:     {
462:         return;
463:     }
464: 
465:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
466:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
467: 
468:     // Create a message bubble
469:     lv_obj_t *msg_bubble = lv_obj_create(content_);
470:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(msg_bubble, 8, 0);
471:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(msg_bubble, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
472:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
473:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
474: 
475:     // Create the message text
476:     lv_obj_t *msg_text = lv_label_create(msg_bubble);
477:     lv_label_set_text(msg_text, content);
478: 
479:     // Calculate actual text width
480:     lv_coord_t text_width = lv_txt_get_width(content, strlen(content), text_font, 0);
481: 
482:     // Calculate bubble width
483:     lv_coord_t max_width = LV_HOR_RES * 85 / 100 - 16; // 85% of screen width
484:     lv_coord_t min_width = 20;
485:     lv_coord_t bubble_width;
486: 
487:     // Ensure text width is not less than minimum width
488:     if (text_width < min_width)
489:     {
490:         text_width = min_width;
491:     }
492: 
493:     // If text width is less than max width, use text width
494:     if (text_width < max_width)
495:     {
496:         bubble_width = text_width;
497:     }
498:     else
499:     {
500:         bubble_width = max_width;
501:     }
502: 
503:     // Set message text width
504:     lv_obj_set_width(msg_text, bubble_width); // Subtract padding
505:     lv_label_set_long_mode(msg_text, LV_LABEL_LONG_WRAP);
506: 
507:     // Set bubble width
508:     lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, bubble_width);
509:     lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
510: 
511:     // Set alignment and style based on message role
512:     if (strcmp(role, "user") == 0)
513:     {
514:         // User messages are right-aligned with green background
515:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->user_bubble_color(), 0);
516:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
517:         // Set text color for contrast
518:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
519: 
520:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
521:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"user");
522: 
523:         // Set appropriate width for content
524:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
525:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
526: 
527:         // Don't grow
528:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
529:     }
530:     else if (strcmp(role, "assistant") == 0)
531:     {
532:         // Assistant messages are left-aligned with white background
533:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
534:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
535:         // Set text color for contrast
536:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
537: 
538:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
539:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"assistant");
540: 
541:         // Set appropriate width for content
542:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
543:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
544: 
545:         // Don't grow
546:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
547:     }
548:     else if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
549:     {
550:         // System messages are center-aligned with light gray background
551:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
552:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
553:         // Set text color for contrast
554:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->system_text_color(), 0);
555: 
556:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
557:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"system");
558: 
559:         // Set appropriate width for content
560:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
561:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
562: 
563:         // Don't grow
564:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
565:     }
566: 
567:     // Create a full-width container for user messages to ensure right alignment
568:     if (strcmp(role, "user") == 0)
569:     {
570:         // Create a full-width container
571:         lv_obj_t *container = lv_obj_create(content_);
572:         lv_obj_set_width(container, LV_HOR_RES);
573:         lv_obj_set_height(container, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
574: 
575:         // Make container transparent and borderless
576:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
577:         lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container, 0, 0);
578:         lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container, 0, 0);
579: 
580:         // Move the message bubble into this container
581:         lv_obj_set_parent(msg_bubble, container);
582: 
583:         // Right align the bubble in the container
584:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_RIGHT_MID, -25, 0);
585: 
586:         // Auto-scroll to this container
587:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(container, LV_ANIM_ON);
588:     }
589:     else if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
590:     {
591:         // Create full-width container for system messages to ensure center alignment
592:         lv_obj_t *container = lv_obj_create(content_);
593:         lv_obj_set_width(container, LV_HOR_RES);
594:         lv_obj_set_height(container, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
595: 
596:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
597:         lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container, 0, 0);
598:         lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container, 0, 0);
599: 
600:         lv_obj_set_parent(msg_bubble, container);
601:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
602:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(container, LV_ANIM_ON);
603:     }
604:     else
605:     {
606:         // For assistant messages
607:         // Left align assistant messages
608:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
609: 
610:         // Auto-scroll to the message bubble
611:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(msg_bubble, LV_ANIM_ON);
612:     }
613: 
614:     // Store reference to the latest message label
615:     chat_message_label_ = msg_text;
616: }

618: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
619: {
620:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
621:     if (content_ == nullptr)
622:     {
623:         return;
624:     }
625: 
626:     if (image == nullptr)
627:     {
628:         return;
629:     }
630: 
631:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
632:     // Create a message bubble for image preview
633:     lv_obj_t *img_bubble = lv_obj_create(content_);
634:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(img_bubble, 8, 0);
635:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(img_bubble, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
636:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(img_bubble, 0, 0);
637:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
638: 
639:     // Set image bubble background color (similar to system message)
640:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
641:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(img_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
642: 
643:     // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
644:     lv_obj_set_user_data(img_bubble, (void *)"image");
645: 
646:     // Create the image object inside the bubble
647:     lv_obj_t *preview_image = lv_image_create(img_bubble);
648: 
649:     // Calculate appropriate size for the image
650:     lv_coord_t max_width = LV_HOR_RES * 70 / 100;  // 70% of screen width
651:     lv_coord_t max_height = LV_VER_RES * 50 / 100; // 50% of screen height
652: 
653:     // Calculate zoom factor to fit within maximum dimensions
654:     auto img_dsc = image->image_dsc();
655:     lv_coord_t img_width = img_dsc->header.w;
656:     lv_coord_t img_height = img_dsc->header.h;
657:     if (img_width == 0 || img_height == 0)
658:     {
659:         img_width = max_width;
660:         img_height = max_height;
661:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Invalid image dimensions: %ld x %ld, using default dimensions: %ld x %ld", img_width, img_height, max_width, max_height);
662:     }
663: 
664:     lv_coord_t zoom_w = (max_width * 256) / img_width;
665:     lv_coord_t zoom_h = (max_height * 256) / img_height;
666:     lv_coord_t zoom = (zoom_w < zoom_h) ? zoom_w : zoom_h;
667: 
668:     // Ensure zoom doesn't exceed 256 (100%)
669:     if (zoom > 256)
670:         zoom = 256;
671: 
672:     // Set image properties
673:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image, img_dsc);
674:     lv_image_set_scale(preview_image, zoom);
675: 
676:     // Add event handler to clean up LvglImage when image is deleted
677:     // We need to transfer ownership of the unique_ptr to the event callback
678:     LvglImage *raw_image = image.release(); // Release ownership of smart pointer
679:     lv_obj_add_event_cb(preview_image, [](lv_event_t *e)
680:                         {
681:         LvglImage* img = (LvglImage*)lv_event_get_user_data(e);
682:         if (img != nullptr) {
683:             delete img; // Properly release memory by deleting LvglImage object
684:         } }, LV_EVENT_DELETE, (void *)raw_image);
685: 
686:     // Calculate actual scaled image dimensions
687:     lv_coord_t scaled_width = (img_width * zoom) / 256;
688:     lv_coord_t scaled_height = (img_height * zoom) / 256;
689: 
690:     // Set bubble size to be 16 pixels larger than the image (8 pixels on each side)
691:     lv_obj_set_width(img_bubble, scaled_width + 16);
692:     lv_obj_set_height(img_bubble, scaled_height + 16);
693: 
694:     // Don't grow in flex layout
695:     lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(img_bubble, 0, 0);
696: 
697:     // Center the image within the bubble
698:     lv_obj_center(preview_image);
699: 
700:     // Left align the image bubble like assistant messages
701:     lv_obj_align(img_bubble, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
702: 
703:     // Auto-scroll to the image bubble
704:     lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(img_bubble, LV_ANIM_ON);
705: }
706: #else
707: void LcdDisplay::SetupUI()
708: {
709:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
710:     LvglTheme *lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
711:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
712:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
713:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
714: 
715:     auto screen = lv_screen_active();
716:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
717:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
718:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(screen, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
719: 
720:     /* Container - used as background */
721:     container_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
722:     lv_obj_set_size(container_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_VER_RES);
723:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(container_, 0, 0);
724:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container_, 0, 0);
725:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container_, 0, 0);
726:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
727:     lv_obj_set_style_border_color(container_, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
728: 
729:     /* Bottom layer: emoji_box_ - centered display */
730:     emoji_box_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
731:     lv_obj_set_size(emoji_box_, LV_SIZE_CONTENT, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
732:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(emoji_box_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
733:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(emoji_box_, 0, 0);
734:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(emoji_box_, 0, 0);
735:     lv_obj_align(emoji_box_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
736: 
737:     emoji_label_ = lv_label_create(emoji_box_);
738:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(emoji_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
739:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
740:     lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, FONT_AWESOME_MICROCHIP_AI);
741: 
742:     emoji_image_ = lv_img_create(emoji_box_);
743:     lv_obj_center(emoji_image_);
744:     lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
745: 
746:     /* Middle layer: preview_image_ - centered display */
747:     preview_image_ = lv_image_create(screen);
748:     lv_obj_set_size(preview_image_, width_ / 2, height_ / 2);
749:     lv_obj_align(preview_image_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
750:     lv_obj_add_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
751: 
752:     /* Layer 1: Top bar - for status icons */
753:     top_bar_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
754:     lv_obj_set_size(top_bar_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
755:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(top_bar_, 0, 0);
756:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0); // 50% opacity background
757:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
758:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(top_bar_, 0, 0);
759:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(top_bar_, 0, 0);
760:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
761:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
762:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_left(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
763:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_right(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
764:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
765:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_SPACE_BETWEEN, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
766:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(top_bar_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);

862: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
863: {
864:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
865:     if (preview_image_ == nullptr)
866:     {
867:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Preview image is not initialized");
868:         return;
869:     }
870: 
871:     if (image == nullptr)
872:     {
873:         esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
874:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_box_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
875:         lv_obj_add_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
876:         preview_image_cached_.reset();
877:         if (gif_controller_)
878:         {
879:             gif_controller_->Start();
880:         }
881:         return;
882:     }
883: 
884:     preview_image_cached_ = std::move(image);
885:     auto img_dsc = preview_image_cached_->image_dsc();
886:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image_, img_dsc);
887:     if (img_dsc->header.w > 0 && img_dsc->header.h > 0)
888:     {
889:         // zoom factor 0.5
890:         lv_image_set_scale(preview_image_, 128 * width_ / img_dsc->header.w);
891:     }
892: 
893:     // Hide emoji_box_
894:     if (gif_controller_)
895:     {
896:         gif_controller_->Stop();
897:     }
898:     lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_box_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
899:     lv_obj_remove_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
900:     esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
901:     ESP_ERROR_CHECK(esp_timer_start_once(preview_timer_, PREVIEW_IMAGE_DURATION_MS * 1000));
902: }

915: void LcdDisplay::SetEmotion(const char *emotion)
916: {
917:     // Stop any running GIF animation
918:     if (gif_controller_)
919:     {
920:         DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
921:         gif_controller_->Stop();
922:         gif_controller_.reset();
923:     }
924: 
925:     if (emoji_image_ == nullptr)
926:     {
927:         return;
928:     }
929: 
930:     auto emoji_collection = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_)->emoji_collection();
931:     auto image = emoji_collection != nullptr ? emoji_collection->GetEmojiImage(emotion) : nullptr;
932:     if (image == nullptr)
933:     {
934:         const char *utf8 = font_awesome_get_utf8(emotion);
935:         if (utf8 != nullptr && emoji_label_ != nullptr)
936:         {
937:             DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
938:             lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, utf8);
939:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
940:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
941:         }
942:         return;
943:     }
944: 
945:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
946:     if (image->IsGif())
947:     {
948:         // Create new GIF controller
949:         gif_controller_ = std::make_unique<LvglGif>(image->image_dsc());
950: 
951:         if (gif_controller_->IsLoaded())
952:         {
953:             // Set up frame update callback
954:             gif_controller_->SetFrameCallback([this]()
955:                                               { lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc()); });
956: 
957:             // Set initial frame and start animation
958:             lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc());
959:             gif_controller_->Start();
960: 
961:             // Show GIF, hide others
962:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
963:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
964:         }
965:         else
966:         {
967:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to load GIF for emotion: %s", emotion);
968:             gif_controller_.reset();
969:         }
970:     }
971:     else
972:     {
973:         lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, image->image_dsc());
974:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
975:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
976:     }
977: 
978: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
979:     // In WeChat message style, if emotion is neutral, don't display it
980:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
981:     if (strcmp(emotion, "neutral") == 0 && child_count > 0)
982:     {
983:         // Stop GIF animation if running
984:         if (gif_controller_)
985:         {
986:             gif_controller_->Stop();
987:             gif_controller_.reset();
988:         }
989: 
990:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
991:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
992:     }
993: #endif
994: }

996: void LcdDisplay::SetTheme(Theme *theme)
997: {
998:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
999: 
1000:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(theme);
1001: 
1002:     // Get the active screen
1003:     lv_obj_t *screen = lv_screen_active();
1004: 
1005:     // Set font
1006:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
1007:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
1008:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
1009: 
1010:     if (text_font->line_height >= 40)
1011:     {
1012:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1013:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1014:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1015:     }
1016:     else
1017:     {
1018:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
1019:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
1020:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
1021:     }
1022: 
1023:     // Set parent text color
1024:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
1025:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1026: 
1027:     // Set background image
1028:     if (lvgl_theme->background_image() != nullptr)
1029:     {
1030:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, lvgl_theme->background_image()->image_dsc(), 0);
1031:     }
1032:     else
1033:     {
1034:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, nullptr, 0);
1035:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1036:     }
1037: 
1038:     // Update top bar background color with 50% opacity
1039:     if (top_bar_ != nullptr)
1040:     {
1041:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
1042:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1043:     }
1044: 
1045:     // Update status bar elements
1046:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1047:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1048:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1049:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1050:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1051:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1052: 
1053:     // If we have the chat message style, update all message bubbles
1054: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
1055:     // Set content background opacity
1056:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(content_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
1057: 
1058:     // Iterate through all children of content (message containers or bubbles)
1059:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
1060:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < child_count; i++)
1061:     {
1062:         lv_obj_t *obj = lv_obj_get_child(content_, i);
1063:         if (obj == nullptr)
1064:             continue;
1065: 
1066:         lv_obj_t *bubble = nullptr;
1067: 
1068:         // Check if this object is a container or bubble
1069:         // If it's a container (user or system message), get its child as bubble
1070:         // If it's a bubble (assistant message), use it directly
1071:         if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(obj) > 0)
1072:         {
1073:             // Might be a container, check if it's a user or system message container
1074:             // User and system message containers are transparent
1075:             lv_opa_t bg_opa = lv_obj_get_style_bg_opa(obj, 0);
1076:             if (bg_opa == LV_OPA_TRANSP)
1077:             {
1078:                 // This is a user or system message container
1079:                 bubble = lv_obj_get_child(obj, 0);
1080:             }
1081:             else
1082:             {
1083:                 // This might be an assistant message bubble itself
1084:                 bubble = obj;
1085:             }
1086:         }
1087:         else
1088:         {
1089:             // No child elements, might be other UI elements, skip
1090:             continue;
1091:         }
1092: 
1093:         if (bubble == nullptr)
1094:             continue;
1095: 
1096:         // Use saved user data to identify bubble type
1097:         void *bubble_type_ptr = lv_obj_get_user_data(bubble);
1098:         if (bubble_type_ptr != nullptr)
1099:         {
1100:             const char *bubble_type = static_cast<const char *>(bubble_type_ptr);
1101: 
1102:             // Apply correct color based on bubble type
1103:             if (strcmp(bubble_type, "user") == 0)
1104:             {
1105:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->user_bubble_color(), 0);
1106:             }
1107:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "assistant") == 0)
1108:             {
1109:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
1110:             }
1111:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
1112:             {
1113:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
1114:             }
1115:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "image") == 0)
1116:             {
1117:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
1118:             }
1119: 
1120:             // Update border color
1121:             lv_obj_set_style_border_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
1122: 
1123:             // Update text color for the message
1124:             if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(bubble) > 0)
1125:             {
1126:                 lv_obj_t *text = lv_obj_get_child(bubble, 0);
1127:                 if (text != nullptr)
1128:                 {
1129:                     // Set text color based on bubble type
1130:                     if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
1131:                     {
1132:                         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(text, lvgl_theme->system_text_color(), 0);
1133:                     }
1134:                     else
1135:                     {
1136:                         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1137:                     }
1138:                 }
1139:             }
1140:         }
1141:         else
1142:         {
1143:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "child[%lu] Bubble type is not found", i);
1144:         }
1145:     }
1146: #else
1147:     // Simple UI mode - just update the main chat message
1148:     if (chat_message_label_ != nullptr)
1149:     {
1150:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(chat_message_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1151:     }
1152: 
1153:     if (emoji_label_ != nullptr)
1154:     {
1155:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1156:     }
1157: 
1158:     // Update bottom bar background color with 50% opacity
1159:     if (bottom_bar_ != nullptr)
1160:     {
1161:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(bottom_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
1162:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bottom_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1163:     }
1164: #endif
1165: 
1166:     // Update low battery popup
1167:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->low_battery_color(), 0);
1168: 
1169:     // No errors occurred. Save theme to settings
1170:     Display::SetTheme(lvgl_theme);
1171: }

The `LcdDisplay::SetupUI` function initializes and configures the user interface layout for the LCD display using the LVGL graphics library. It sets up a full-screen container with a top bar for status icons (network, mute, battery) and applies styling based on the current theme, including fonts, colors, and spacing. This function establishes the visual structure and appearance of the device's main display interface.

qualitative.analysis:
Semantic Correctness:
The generated code attempts to implement a UI setup function that largely mirrors the intention of the ground truth but introduces structural changes that alter semantics. For example, it adds new components like `preview_image_`, `emoji_box_`, and `bottom_bar_` which are not part of the original design. These additions change the intended layout hierarchy and may affect how other parts of the system interact with this UI. However, core elements such as setting up fonts, colors, containers, top bar, status bar, labels, and popups are semantically aligned.

Structure Similarity:
While many API calls and styling patterns match the ground truth, there are notable differences in object creation order and parent-child relationships. The use of flex layouts is consistent, but alignment strategies differ slightly (e.g., more reliance on `lv_obj_align()`). Some stylistic choices like setting `LV_LAYOUT_NONE` and using absolute positioning appear in both versions, showing partial structural overlap. Differences include extra widgets and inconsistent naming or usage of certain objects (`content_` vs `bottom_bar_`).

Functional Completeness:
Several key components from the ground truth are missing or replaced in the generated version:
- Missing: `container_` used as a flex column container for layering; instead, layers are directly added to screen.
- Missing: Proper chat content area (`content_`) with scrollable message list — replaced by `bottom_bar_`.
- Added: New elements like `preview_image_`, `emoji_box_` which aren't present in the reference implementation.
- Partially implemented: Battery popup and label exist but might behave differently due to layout context.
Overall, critical functionality related to chat message handling and layered container architecture is incomplete compared to the ground truth.

results.description: The `LcdDisplay::SetChatMessage` function displays chat messages on the LCD screen, managing message history by removing old messages when necessary and handling special display rules for system messages. It creates styled message bubbles with appropriate sizing and positioning based on the message content and role (e.g., user, AI, system). The function also ensures that empty messages are not displayed and hides the AI logo when non-system messages are shown.

22: LV_FONT_DECLARE(font_awesome_30_4);
23: 
24: void LcdDisplay::InitializeLcdThemes()
25: {
26:     auto text_font = std::make_shared<LvglBuiltInFont>(&BUILTIN_TEXT_FONT);
27:     auto icon_font = std::make_shared<LvglBuiltInFont>(&BUILTIN_ICON_FONT);
28:     auto large_icon_font = std::make_shared<LvglBuiltInFont>(&font_awesome_30_4);
29: 
30:     // light theme
31:     auto light_theme = new LvglTheme("light");
32:     light_theme->set_background_color(lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF));
33:     light_theme->set_text_color(lv_color_hex(0x000000));
34:     light_theme->set_chat_background_color(lv_color_hex(0xE0E0E0));
35:     light_theme->set_user_bubble_color(lv_color_hex(0x00FF00));
36:     light_theme->set_assistant_bubble_color(lv_color_hex(0xDDDDDD));
37:     light_theme->set_system_bubble_color(lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF));
38:     light_theme->set_system_text_color(lv_color_hex(0x000000));
39:     light_theme->set_border_color(lv_color_hex(0x000000));
40:     light_theme->set_low_battery_color(lv_color_hex(0x000000));
41:     light_theme->set_text_font(text_font);
42:     light_theme->set_icon_font(icon_font);
43:     light_theme->set_large_icon_font(large_icon_font);
44: 
45:     // dark theme
46:     auto dark_theme = new LvglTheme("dark");
47:     dark_theme->set_background_color(lv_color_hex(0x000000));
48:     dark_theme->set_text_color(lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF));
49:     dark_theme->set_chat_background_color(lv_color_hex(0x1F1F1F));
50:     dark_theme->set_user_bubble_color(lv_color_hex(0x00FF00));
51:     dark_theme->set_assistant_bubble_color(lv_color_hex(0x222222));
52:     dark_theme->set_system_bubble_color(lv_color_hex(0x000000));
53:     dark_theme->set_system_text_color(lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF));
54:     dark_theme->set_border_color(lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF));
55:     dark_theme->set_low_battery_color(lv_color_hex(0xFF0000));
56:     dark_theme->set_text_font(text_font);
57:     dark_theme->set_icon_font(icon_font);
58:     dark_theme->set_large_icon_font(large_icon_font);
59: 
60:     auto &theme_manager = LvglThemeManager::GetInstance();
61:     theme_manager.RegisterTheme("light", light_theme);
62:     theme_manager.RegisterTheme("dark", dark_theme);
63: }

65: LcdDisplay::LcdDisplay(esp_lcd_panel_io_handle_t panel_io, esp_lcd_panel_handle_t panel, int width, int height)
66:     : panel_io_(panel_io), panel_(panel)
67: {
68:     width_ = width;
69:     height_ = height;
70: 
71:     // Initialize LCD themes
72:     InitializeLcdThemes();
73: 
74:     // Load theme from settings
75:     Settings settings("display", false);
76:     std::string theme_name = settings.GetString("theme", "light");
77:     current_theme_ = LvglThemeManager::GetInstance().GetTheme(theme_name);
78: 
79:     // Create a timer to hide the preview image
80:     esp_timer_create_args_t preview_timer_args = {
81:         .callback = [](void *arg)
82:         {
83:             LcdDisplay *display = static_cast<LcdDisplay *>(arg);
84:             display->SetPreviewImage(nullptr);
85:         },
86:         .arg = this,
87:         .dispatch_method = ESP_TIMER_TASK,
88:         .name = "preview_timer",
89:         .skip_unhandled_events = false,
90:     };
91:     esp_timer_create(&preview_timer_args, &preview_timer_);
92: }
93: 
94: SpiLcdDisplay::SpiLcdDisplay(esp_lcd_panel_io_handle_t panel_io, esp_lcd_panel_handle_t panel,
95:                              int width, int height, int offset_x, int offset_y, bool mirror_x, bool mirror_y, bool swap_xy)
96:     : LcdDisplay(panel_io, panel, width, height)
97: {
98: 
99:     // draw white
100:     std::vector<uint16_t> buffer(width_, 0xFFFF);
101:     for (int y = 0; y < height_; y++)
102:     {
103:         esp_lcd_panel_draw_bitmap(panel_, 0, y, width_, y + 1, buffer.data());
104:     }
105: 
106:     // Set the display to on
107:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Turning display on");
108:     {
109:         esp_err_t __err = esp_lcd_panel_disp_on_off(panel_, true);
110:         if (__err == ESP_ERR_NOT_SUPPORTED)
111:         {
112:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Panel does not support disp_on_off; assuming ON");
113:         }
114:         else
115:         {
116:             ESP_ERROR_CHECK(__err);
117:         }
118:     }
119: 
120:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initialize LVGL library");
121:     lv_init();
122: 
123: #if CONFIG_SPIRAM
124:     // lv image cache, currently only PNG is supported
125:     size_t psram_size_mb = esp_psram_get_size() / 1024 / 1024;
126:     if (psram_size_mb >= 8)
127:     {
128:         lv_image_cache_resize(2 * 1024 * 1024, true);
129:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Use 2MB of PSRAM for image cache");
130:     }
131:     else if (psram_size_mb >= 2)
132:     {
133:         lv_image_cache_resize(512 * 1024, true);
134:         ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Use 512KB of PSRAM for image cache");
135:     }
136: #endif
137: 
138:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initialize LVGL port");
139:     lvgl_port_cfg_t port_cfg = ESP_LVGL_PORT_INIT_CONFIG();
140:     port_cfg.task_priority = 1;
141: #if CONFIG_SOC_CPU_CORES_NUM > 1
142:     port_cfg.task_affinity = 1;
143: #endif
144:     lvgl_port_init(&port_cfg);
145: 
146:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Adding LCD display");
147:     const lvgl_port_display_cfg_t display_cfg = {
148:         .io_handle = panel_io_,
149:         .panel_handle = panel_,
150:         .control_handle = nullptr,
151:         .buffer_size = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_ * 20),
152:         .double_buffer = false,
153:         .trans_size = 0,
154:         .hres = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_),
155:         .vres = static_cast<uint32_t>(height_),
156:         .monochrome = false,
157:         .rotation = {
158:             .swap_xy = swap_xy,
159:             .mirror_x = mirror_x,
160:             .mirror_y = mirror_y,
161:         },
162:         .color_format = LV_COLOR_FORMAT_RGB565,
163:         .flags = {
164:             .buff_dma = 1,
165:             .buff_spiram = 0,
166:             .sw_rotate = 0,
167:             .swap_bytes = 1,
168:             .full_refresh = 0,
169:             .direct_mode = 0,
170:         },
171:     };
172: 
173:     display_ = lvgl_port_add_disp(&display_cfg);
174:     if (display_ == nullptr)
175:     {
176:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to add display");
177:         return;
178:     }
179: 
180:     if (offset_x != 0 || offset_y != 0)
181:     {
182:         lv_display_set_offset(display_, offset_x, offset_y);
183:     }
184: 
185:     SetupUI();
186: }

188: // RGB LCD implementation
189: RgbLcdDisplay::RgbLcdDisplay(esp_lcd_panel_io_handle_t panel_io, esp_lcd_panel_handle_t panel,
190:                              int width, int height, int offset_x, int offset_y,
191:                              bool mirror_x, bool mirror_y, bool swap_xy)
192:     : LcdDisplay(panel_io, panel, width, height)
193: {
194: 
195:     // draw white
196:     std::vector<uint16_t> buffer(width_, 0xFFFF);
197:     for (int y = 0; y < height_; y++)
198:     {
199:         esp_lcd_panel_draw_bitmap(panel_, 0, y, width_, y + 1, buffer.data());
200:     }
201: 
202:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initialize LVGL library");
203:     lv_init();
204: 
205:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initialize LVGL port");
206:     lvgl_port_cfg_t port_cfg = ESP_LVGL_PORT_INIT_CONFIG();
207:     port_cfg.task_priority = 1;
208:     port_cfg.timer_period_ms = 50;
209:     lvgl_port_init(&port_cfg);
210: 
211:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Adding LCD display");
212:     const lvgl_port_display_cfg_t display_cfg = {
213:         .io_handle = panel_io_,
214:         .panel_handle = panel_,
215:         .buffer_size = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_ * 20),
216:         .double_buffer = true,
217:         .hres = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_),
218:         .vres = static_cast<uint32_t>(height_),
219:         .rotation = {
220:             .swap_xy = swap_xy,
221:             .mirror_x = mirror_x,
222:             .mirror_y = mirror_y,
223:         },
224:         .flags = {
225:             .buff_dma = 1,
226:             .swap_bytes = 0,
227:             .full_refresh = 1,
228:             .direct_mode = 1,
229:         },
230:     };
231: 
232:     const lvgl_port_display_rgb_cfg_t rgb_cfg = {
233:         .flags = {
234:             .bb_mode = true,
235:             .avoid_tearing = true,
236:         }};
237: 
238:     display_ = lvgl_port_add_disp_rgb(&display_cfg, &rgb_cfg);
239:     if (display_ == nullptr)
240:     {
241:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to add RGB display");
242:         return;
243:     }
244: 
245:     if (offset_x != 0 || offset_y != 0)
246:     {
247:         lv_display_set_offset(display_, offset_x, offset_y);
248:     }
249: 
250:     SetupUI();

253: MipiLcdDisplay::MipiLcdDisplay(esp_lcd_panel_io_handle_t panel_io, esp_lcd_panel_handle_t panel,
254:                                int width, int height, int offset_x, int offset_y,
255:                                bool mirror_x, bool mirror_y, bool swap_xy)
256:     : LcdDisplay(panel_io, panel, width, height)
257: {
258: 
259:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initialize LVGL library");
260:     lv_init();
261: 
262:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initialize LVGL port");
263:     lvgl_port_cfg_t port_cfg = ESP_LVGL_PORT_INIT_CONFIG();
264:     lvgl_port_init(&port_cfg);
265: 
266:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Adding LCD display");
267:     const lvgl_port_display_cfg_t disp_cfg = {
268:         .io_handle = panel_io,
269:         .panel_handle = panel,
270:         .control_handle = nullptr,
271:         .buffer_size = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_ * 50),
272:         .double_buffer = false,
273:         .hres = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_),
274:         .vres = static_cast<uint32_t>(height_),
275:         .monochrome = false,
276:         /* Rotation values must be same as used in esp_lcd for initial settings of the screen */
277:         .rotation = {
278:             .swap_xy = swap_xy,
279:             .mirror_x = mirror_x,
280:             .mirror_y = mirror_y,
281:         },
282:         .flags = {
283:             .buff_dma = true,
284:             .buff_spiram = false,
285:             .sw_rotate = true,
286:         },
287:     };
288: 
289:     const lvgl_port_display_dsi_cfg_t dpi_cfg = {
290:         .flags = {
291:             .avoid_tearing = false,
292:         }};
293:     display_ = lvgl_port_add_disp_dsi(&disp_cfg, &dpi_cfg);
294:     if (display_ == nullptr)
295:     {
296:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to add display");
297:         return;
298:     }
299: 
300:     if (offset_x != 0 || offset_y != 0)
301:     {
302:         lv_display_set_offset(display_, offset_x, offset_y);
303:     }
304: 
305:     SetupUI();
306: }

308: LcdDisplay::~LcdDisplay()
309: {
310:     SetPreviewImage(nullptr);
311: 
312:     // Clean up GIF controller
313:     if (gif_controller_)
314:     {
315:         gif_controller_->Stop();
316:         gif_controller_.reset();
317:     }
318: 
319:     if (preview_timer_ != nullptr)
320:     {
321:         esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
322:         esp_timer_delete(preview_timer_);
323:     }
324: 
325:     if (preview_image_ != nullptr)
326:     {
327:         lv_obj_del(preview_image_);
328:     }
329:     if (chat_message_label_ != nullptr)
330:     {
331:         lv_obj_del(chat_message_label_);
332:     }
333:     if (emoji_label_ != nullptr)
334:     {
335:         lv_obj_del(emoji_label_);
336:     }
337:     if (emoji_image_ != nullptr)
338:     {
339:         lv_obj_del(emoji_image_);
340:     }
341:     if (emoji_box_ != nullptr)
342:     {
343:         lv_obj_del(emoji_box_);
344:     }
345:     if (content_ != nullptr)
346:     {
347:         lv_obj_del(content_);
348:     }
349:     if (bottom_bar_ != nullptr)
350:     {
351:         lv_obj_del(bottom_bar_);
352:     }
353:     if (status_bar_ != nullptr)
354:     {
355:         lv_obj_del(status_bar_);
356:     }
357:     if (top_bar_ != nullptr)
358:     {
359:         lv_obj_del(top_bar_);
360:     }
361:     if (side_bar_ != nullptr)
362:     {
363:         lv_obj_del(side_bar_);
364:     }
365:     if (container_ != nullptr)
366:     {
367:         lv_obj_del(container_);
368:     }
369:     if (display_ != nullptr)
370:     {
371:         lv_display_delete(display_);
372:     }
373: 
374:     if (panel_ != nullptr)
375:     {
376:         esp_lcd_panel_del(panel_);
377:     }
378:     if (panel_io_ != nullptr)
379:     {
380:         esp_lcd_panel_io_del(panel_io_);
381:     }
382: }

394: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
395: void LcdDisplay::SetupUI()
396: {
397:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
398: 
399:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
400:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
401:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
402:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
403: 
404:     auto screen = lv_screen_active();
405:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
406:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
407:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(screen, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
408: 
409:     /* Container */
410:     container_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
411:     lv_obj_set_size(container_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_VER_RES);
412:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(container_, 0, 0);
413:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(container_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
414:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container_, 0, 0);
415:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container_, 0, 0);
416:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(container_, 0, 0);
417:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
418:     lv_obj_set_style_border_color(container_, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
419: 
420:     /* Layer 1: Top bar - for status icons */
421:     top_bar_ = lv_obj_create(container_);
422:     lv_obj_set_size(top_bar_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
423:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(top_bar_, 0, 0);
424:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0); // 50% opacity background
425:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
426:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(top_bar_, 0, 0);
427:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(top_bar_, 0, 0);
428:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
429:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
430:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_left(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
431:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_right(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
432:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
433:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_SPACE_BETWEEN, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
434:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(top_bar_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
435: 
436:     // Left icon
437:     network_label_ = lv_label_create(top_bar_);
438:     lv_label_set_text(network_label_, "");
439:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
440:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
441: 
442:     // Right icons container
443:     lv_obj_t *right_icons = lv_obj_create(top_bar_);
444:     lv_obj_set_size(right_icons, LV_SIZE_CONTENT, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
445:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(right_icons, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
446:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(right_icons, 0, 0);
447:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(right_icons, 0, 0);
448:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(right_icons, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
449:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(right_icons, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_END, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
450: 
451:     mute_label_ = lv_label_create(right_icons);
452:     lv_label_set_text(mute_label_, "");
453:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
454:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
455: 
456:     battery_label_ = lv_label_create(right_icons);
457:     lv_label_set_text(battery_label_, "");
458:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
459:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
460:     lv_obj_set_style_margin_left(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
461: 
462:     /* Layer 2: Status bar - for center text labels */
463:     status_bar_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
464:     lv_obj_set_size(status_bar_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
465:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(status_bar_, 0, 0);
466:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(status_bar_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0); // Transparent background
467:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(status_bar_, 0, 0);
468:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(status_bar_, 0, 0);
469:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(status_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
470:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(status_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
471:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(status_bar_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
472:     lv_obj_set_style_layout(status_bar_, LV_LAYOUT_NONE, 0); // Use absolute positioning
473:     lv_obj_align(status_bar_, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);       // Overlap with top_bar_
474: 
475:     notification_label_ = lv_label_create(status_bar_);
476:     lv_obj_set_width(notification_label_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.8);
477:     lv_obj_set_style_text_align(notification_label_, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
478:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
479:     lv_label_set_text(notification_label_, "");
480:     lv_obj_align(notification_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
481:     lv_obj_add_flag(notification_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
482: 
483:     status_label_ = lv_label_create(status_bar_);
484:     lv_obj_set_width(status_label_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.8);
485:     lv_label_set_long_mode(status_label_, LV_LABEL_LONG_SCROLL_CIRCULAR);
486:     lv_obj_set_style_text_align(status_label_, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
487:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
488:     lv_label_set_text(status_label_, Lang::Strings::INITIALIZING);
489:     lv_obj_align(status_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
490: 
491:     /* Content - Chat area */
492:     content_ = lv_obj_create(container_);
493:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(content_, 0, 0);
494:     lv_obj_set_width(content_, LV_HOR_RES);
495:     lv_obj_set_flex_grow(content_, 1);
496:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(content_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
497:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(content_, 0, 0);
498:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(content_, lvgl_theme->chat_background_color(), 0); // Background for chat area
499: 
500:     // Enable scrolling for chat content
501:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(content_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
502:     lv_obj_set_scroll_dir(content_, LV_DIR_VER);
503: 
504:     // Create a flex container for chat messages
505:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(content_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
506:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(content_, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START);
507:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(content_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0); // Space between messages
508: 
509:     // We'll create chat messages dynamically in SetChatMessage
510:     chat_message_label_ = nullptr;
511: 
512:     low_battery_popup_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
513:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(low_battery_popup_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
514:     lv_obj_set_size(low_battery_popup_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.9, text_font->line_height * 2);
515:     lv_obj_align(low_battery_popup_, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, -lvgl_theme->spacing(4));
516:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->low_battery_color(), 0);
517:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
518:     low_battery_label_ = lv_label_create(low_battery_popup_);
519:     lv_label_set_text(low_battery_label_, Lang::Strings::BATTERY_NEED_CHARGE);
520:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(low_battery_label_, lv_color_white(), 0);
521:     lv_obj_center(low_battery_label_);
522:     lv_obj_add_flag(low_battery_popup_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
523: 
524:     emoji_image_ = lv_img_create(screen);
525:     lv_obj_align(emoji_image_, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, text_font->line_height + lvgl_theme->spacing(8));
526: 
527:     // Display AI logo while booting
528:     emoji_label_ = lv_label_create(screen);
529:     lv_obj_center(emoji_label_);
530:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(emoji_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
531:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
532:     lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, FONT_AWESOME_MICROCHIP_AI);
533: }

543: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
544: {
545:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
546:     if (content_ == nullptr)
547:     {
548:         return;
549:     }
550: 
551:     if (image == nullptr)
552:     {
553:         return;
554:     }
555: 
556:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
557:     // Create a message bubble for image preview
558:     lv_obj_t *img_bubble = lv_obj_create(content_);
559:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(img_bubble, 8, 0);
560:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(img_bubble, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
561:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(img_bubble, 0, 0);
562:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
563: 
564:     // Set image bubble background color (similar to system message)
565:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
566:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(img_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
567: 
568:     // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
569:     lv_obj_set_user_data(img_bubble, (void *)"image");
570: 
571:     // Create the image object inside the bubble
572:     lv_obj_t *preview_image = lv_image_create(img_bubble);
573: 
574:     // Calculate appropriate size for the image
575:     lv_coord_t max_width = LV_HOR_RES * 70 / 100;  // 70% of screen width
576:     lv_coord_t max_height = LV_VER_RES * 50 / 100; // 50% of screen height
577: 
578:     // Calculate zoom factor to fit within maximum dimensions
579:     auto img_dsc = image->image_dsc();
580:     lv_coord_t img_width = img_dsc->header.w;
581:     lv_coord_t img_height = img_dsc->header.h;
582:     if (img_width == 0 || img_height == 0)
583:     {
584:         img_width = max_width;
585:         img_height = max_height;
586:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Invalid image dimensions: %ld x %ld, using default dimensions: %ld x %ld", img_width, img_height, max_width, max_height);
587:     }
588: 
589:     lv_coord_t zoom_w = (max_width * 256) / img_width;
590:     lv_coord_t zoom_h = (max_height * 256) / img_height;
591:     lv_coord_t zoom = (zoom_w < zoom_h) ? zoom_w : zoom_h;
592: 
593:     // Ensure zoom doesn't exceed 256 (100%)
594:     if (zoom > 256)
595:         zoom = 256;
596: 
597:     // Set image properties
598:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image, img_dsc);
599:     lv_image_set_scale(preview_image, zoom);
600: 
601:     // Add event handler to clean up LvglImage when image is deleted
602:     // We need to transfer ownership of the unique_ptr to the event callback
603:     LvglImage *raw_image = image.release(); // Release ownership of smart pointer
604:     lv_obj_add_event_cb(preview_image, [](lv_event_t *e)
605:                         {
606:         LvglImage* img = (LvglImage*)lv_event_get_user_data(e);
607:         if (img != nullptr) {
608:             delete img; // Properly release memory by deleting LvglImage object
609:         } }, LV_EVENT_DELETE, (void *)raw_image);
610: 
611:     // Calculate actual scaled image dimensions
612:     lv_coord_t scaled_width = (img_width * zoom) / 256;
613:     lv_coord_t scaled_height = (img_height * zoom) / 256;
614: 
615:     // Set bubble size to be 16 pixels larger than the image (8 pixels on each side)
616:     lv_obj_set_width(img_bubble, scaled_width + 16);
617:     lv_obj_set_height(img_bubble, scaled_height + 16);
618: 
619:     // Don't grow in flex layout
620:     lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(img_bubble, 0, 0);
621: 
622:     // Center the image within the bubble
623:     lv_obj_center(preview_image);
624: 
625:     // Left align the image bubble like assistant messages
626:     lv_obj_align(img_bubble, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
627: 
628:     // Auto-scroll to the image bubble
629:     lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(img_bubble, LV_ANIM_ON);
630: }
631: #else

787: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
788: {
789:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
790:     if (preview_image_ == nullptr)
791:     {
792:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Preview image is not initialized");
793:         return;
794:     }
795: 
796:     if (image == nullptr)
797:     {
798:         esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
799:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_box_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
800:         lv_obj_add_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
801:         preview_image_cached_.reset();
802:         if (gif_controller_)
803:         {
804:             gif_controller_->Start();
805:         }
806:         return;
807:     }
808: 
809:     preview_image_cached_ = std::move(image);
810:     auto img_dsc = preview_image_cached_->image_dsc();
811:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image_, img_dsc);
812:     if (img_dsc->header.w > 0 && img_dsc->header.h > 0)
813:     {
814:         // zoom factor 0.5
815:         lv_image_set_scale(preview_image_, 128 * width_ / img_dsc->header.w);
816:     }
817: 
818:     // Hide emoji_box_
819:     if (gif_controller_)
820:     {
821:         gif_controller_->Stop();
822:     }
823:     lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_box_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
824:     lv_obj_remove_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
825:     esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
826:     ESP_ERROR_CHECK(esp_timer_start_once(preview_timer_, PREVIEW_IMAGE_DURATION_MS * 1000));
827: }

840: void LcdDisplay::SetEmotion(const char *emotion)
841: {
842:     // Stop any running GIF animation
843:     if (gif_controller_)
844:     {
845:         DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
846:         gif_controller_->Stop();
847:         gif_controller_.reset();
848:     }
849: 
850:     if (emoji_image_ == nullptr)
851:     {
852:         return;
853:     }
854: 
855:     auto emoji_collection = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_)->emoji_collection();
856:     auto image = emoji_collection != nullptr ? emoji_collection->GetEmojiImage(emotion) : nullptr;
857:     if (image == nullptr)
858:     {
859:         const char *utf8 = font_awesome_get_utf8(emotion);
860:         if (utf8 != nullptr && emoji_label_ != nullptr)
861:         {
862:             DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
863:             lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, utf8);
864:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
865:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
866:         }
867:         return;
868:     }
869: 
870:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
871:     if (image->IsGif())
872:     {
873:         // Create new GIF controller
874:         gif_controller_ = std::make_unique<LvglGif>(image->image_dsc());
875: 
876:         if (gif_controller_->IsLoaded())
877:         {
878:             // Set up frame update callback
879:             gif_controller_->SetFrameCallback([this]()
880:                                               { lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc()); });
881: 
882:             // Set initial frame and start animation
883:             lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc());
884:             gif_controller_->Start();
885: 
886:             // Show GIF, hide others
887:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
888:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
889:         }
890:         else
891:         {
892:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to load GIF for emotion: %s", emotion);
893:             gif_controller_.reset();
894:         }
895:     }
896:     else
897:     {
898:         lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, image->image_dsc());
899:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
900:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
901:     }
902: 
903: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
904:     // In WeChat message style, if emotion is neutral, don't display it
905:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
906:     if (strcmp(emotion, "neutral") == 0 && child_count > 0)
907:     {
908:         // Stop GIF animation if running
909:         if (gif_controller_)
910:         {
911:             gif_controller_->Stop();
912:             gif_controller_.reset();
913:         }
914: 
915:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
916:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
917:     }
918: #endif
919: }
920: 
921: void LcdDisplay::SetTheme(Theme *theme)
922: {
923:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
924: 
925:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(theme);
926: 
927:     // Get the active screen
928:     lv_obj_t *screen = lv_screen_active();
929: 
930:     // Set font
931:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
932:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
933:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
934: 
935:     if (text_font->line_height >= 40)
936:     {
937:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
938:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
939:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
940:     }
941:     else
942:     {
943:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
944:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
945:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
946:     }
947: 
948:     // Set parent text color
949:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
950:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
951: 
952:     // Set background image
953:     if (lvgl_theme->background_image() != nullptr)
954:     {
955:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, lvgl_theme->background_image()->image_dsc(), 0);
956:     }
957:     else
958:     {
959:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, nullptr, 0);
960:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
961:     }
962: 
963:     // Update top bar background color with 50% opacity
964:     if (top_bar_ != nullptr)
965:     {
966:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
967:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
968:     }
969: 
970:     // Update status bar elements
971:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
972:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
973:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
974:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);

The `LcdDisplay::SetChatMessage` function displays chat messages on the LCD screen, managing message history by removing old messages when necessary and handling special display rules for system messages. It creates styled message bubbles with appropriate sizing and positioning based on the message content and role (e.g., user, AI, system). The function also ensures that empty messages are not displayed and hides the AI logo when non-system messages are shown.

qualitative.analysis:
Semantic Correctness:
The generated code captures the basic idea of adding chat messages with different roles (user, assistant, system) and applies some styling based on role. However, it misses several critical behaviors:
- No proper handling of message history limits during insertion (removal happens after insertion in generated vs before in ground truth).
- No collapsing of consecutive system messages.
- No special alignment containers for user/system messages to achieve correct UI layout.
- Simplified logic for determining bubble width and text wrapping.
- Missing emoji label management for system messages specifically.

Structure Similarity:
There is a moderate resemblance in overall structure — both use LVGL APIs to create objects, apply styles conditionally based on role, and manage scrolling. However:
- Function signature matches but internal organization differs significantly.
- Ground truth uses more nested checks and modular steps (e.g., separate blocks for each role’s rendering).
- Different order of operations: e.g., object creation before safety checks in generated version.
- Use of constants like MAX_MESSAGES differ in definition scope and application timing.

Functional Completeness:
Several important features from the ground truth are missing or simplified:
- No support for dynamic text width calculation or adaptive bubble sizing.
- No dedicated container objects for proper alignment of user/system messages.
- No mechanism to collapse repeated system messages.
- Emoji/logo visibility logic only partially implemented.
- Text font handling and detailed style configuration (like flex properties) are omitted.
- Child count limiting behaves differently (post-insertion deletion instead of pre-check).
Overall, while core functionality exists, many nuanced and essential behaviors for accurate chat display are absent.

results.description: The `SetPreviewImage` function displays a preview of an image on the LCD screen by creating a styled message bubble container and scaling the image to fit within predefined maximum dimensions. It sets the image as the content of the bubble and ensures proper cleanup of the image resource when the display object is deleted. The function handles invalid image dimensions by logging a warning and using default sizes.
