965: 
966: void LcdDisplay::SetEmotion(const char *emotion)
967: {
968:     // Stop any running GIF animation
969:     if (gif_controller_)
970:     {
971:         DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
972:         gif_controller_->Stop();
973:         gif_controller_.reset();
974:     }
975: 
976:     if (emoji_image_ == nullptr)
977:     {
978:         return;
979:     }
980: 
981:     auto emoji_collection = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_)->emoji_collection();
982:     auto image = emoji_collection != nullptr ? emoji_collection->GetEmojiImage(emotion) : nullptr;
983:     if (image == nullptr)
984:     {
985:         const char *utf8 = font_awesome_get_utf8(emotion);
986:         if (utf8 != nullptr && emoji_label_ != nullptr)
987:         {
988:             DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
989:             lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, utf8);
990:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
991:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
992:         }
993:         return;
994:     }
995: 
996:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
997:     if (image->IsGif())
998:     {
999:         // Create new GIF controller
1000:         gif_controller_ = std::make_unique<LvglGif>(image->image_dsc());
1001: 
1002:         if (gif_controller_->IsLoaded())
1003:         {
1004:             // Set up frame update callback
1005:             gif_controller_->SetFrameCallback([this]()
1006:                                               { lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc()); });
1007: 
1008:             // Set initial frame and start animation
1009:             lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc());
1010:             gif_controller_->Start();
1011: 
1012:             // Show GIF, hide others
1013:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1014:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1015:         }
1016:         else
1017:         {
1018:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to load GIF for emotion: %s", emotion);
1019:             gif_controller_.reset();
1020:         }
1021:     }
1022:     else
1023:     {
1024:         lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, image->image_dsc());
1025:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1026:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1027:     }
1028: 
1029: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
1030:     // In WeChat message style, if emotion is neutral, don't display it
1031:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
1032:     if (strcmp(emotion, "neutral") == 0 && child_count > 0)
1033:     {
1034:         // Stop GIF animation if running
1035:         if (gif_controller_)
1036:         {
1037:             gif_controller_->Stop();
1038:             gif_controller_.reset();
1039:         }
1040: 
1041:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1042:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1043:     }
1044: #endif
1045: }
1046: 
1047: void LcdDisplay::SetTheme(Theme *theme)
1048: {
1049:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
1050: 
1051:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(theme);
1052: 
1053:     // Get the active screen
1054:     lv_obj_t *screen = lv_screen_active();
1055: 
1056:     // Set font
1057:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
1058:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
1059:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
1060: 
1061:     if (text_font->line_height >= 40)
1062:     {
1063:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1064:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1065:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1066:     }
1067:     else
1068:     {
1069:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
1070:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
1071:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
1072:     }
1073: 
1074:     // Set parent text color
1075:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
1076:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1077: 
1078:     // Set background image
1079:     if (lvgl_theme->background_image() != nullptr)
1080:     {
1081:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, lvgl_theme->background_image()->image_dsc(), 0);
1082:     }
1083:     else
1084:     {
1085:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, nullptr, 0);
1086:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1087:     }
1088: 
1089:     // Update top bar background color with 50% opacity
1090:     if (top_bar_ != nullptr)
1091:     {
1092:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
1093:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1094:     }
1095: 
1096:     // Update status bar elements
1097:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1098:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1099:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1100:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1101:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1102:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1103: 
1104:     // If we have the chat message style, update all message bubbles
1105: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
1106:     // Set content background opacity
1107:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(content_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
1108: 
1109:     // Iterate through all children of content (message containers or bubbles)
1110:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
1111:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < child_count; i++)
1112:     {
1113:         lv_obj_t *obj = lv_obj_get_child(content_, i);
1114:         if (obj == nullptr)
1115:             continue;
1116: 
1117:         lv_obj_t *bubble = nullptr;
1118: 
1119:         // Check if this object is a container or bubble
1120:         // If it's a container (user or system message), get its child as bubble
1121:         // If it's a bubble (assistant message), use it directly
1122:         if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(obj) > 0)
1123:         {
1124:             // Might be a container, check if it's a user or system message container
1125:             // User and system message containers are transparent
1126:             lv_opa_t bg_opa = lv_obj_get_style_bg_opa(obj, 0);
1127:             if (bg_opa == LV_OPA_TRANSP)
1128:             {
1129:                 // This is a user or system message container
1130:                 bubble = lv_obj_get_child(obj, 0);
1131:             }
1132:             else
1133:             {
1134:                 // This might be an assistant message bubble itself
1135:                 bubble = obj;
1136:             }
1137:         }
1138:         else
1139:         {
1140:             // No child elements, might be other UI elements, skip
1141:             continue;
1142:         }
1143: 
1144:         if (bubble == nullptr)
1145:             continue;
1146: 
1147:         // Use saved user data to identify bubble type
1148:         void *bubble_type_ptr = lv_obj_get_user_data(bubble);
1149:         if (bubble_type_ptr != nullptr)
1150:         {
1151:             const char *bubble_type = static_cast<const char *>(bubble_type_ptr);
1152: 
1153:             // Apply correct color based on bubble type
1154:             if (strcmp(bubble_type, "user") == 0)
1155:             {
1156:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->user_bubble_color(), 0);
1157:             }
1158:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "assistant") == 0)
1159:             {
1160:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
1161:             }
1162:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
1163:             {
1164:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
1165:             }
1166:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "image") == 0)
1167:             {
1168:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
1169:             }
1170: 
1171:             // Update border color
1172:             lv_obj_set_style_border_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
1173: 
1174:             // Update text color for the message
1175:             if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(bubble) > 0)
1176:             {
1177:                 lv_obj_t *text = lv_obj_get_child(bubble, 0);
1178:                 if (text != nullptr)
1179:                 {
1180:                     // Set text color based on bubble type
1181:                     if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
1182:                     {

1184:                     }
1185:                     else

1189:                 }
1190:             }
1191:         }

1193:         {

1195:         }
1196:     }
1197: #else

The `SetPreviewImage` function displays a preview of an image on the LCD screen by creating a styled message bubble container and scaling the image to fit within predefined maximum dimensions. It sets the image as the content of the bubble and ensures proper cleanup of the image resource when the display object is deleted. The function handles invalid image dimensions by logging a warning and using default sizes.

qualitative.analysis:
The generated code significantly deviates from the ground truth both semantically and structurally.

Semantic Correctness:
- The ground truth creates a new image bubble (Lvgl object) for each preview image, styled to match system messages, and displays it inside a dedicated container.
- In contrast, the generated code reuses an existing `preview_image_` object and caches the input image. It also interacts with other UI components such as `emoji_box_`, `gif_controller_`, and a timer (`preview_timer_`) which are not part of the ground truth logic.
- The memory management approach differs drastically — the ground truth transfers ownership of the `LvglImage` via `release()` and uses an LVGL event callback to ensure proper cleanup upon deletion, while the generated code stores it in a class member (`preview_image_cached_`) without explicit cleanup tied to the LVGL lifecycle.
- Scaling logic is different: Ground truth dynamically calculates zoom based on screen percentage and aspect ratio, whereas generated code applies a fixed or semi-fixed scale factor (128 * width_ / img_dsc->header.w).

Structure Similarity:
- Both functions accept a `std::unique_ptr<LvglImage>` parameter and perform null checks at the beginning.
- However, the internal structure diverges greatly:
  - Ground truth involves creating multiple LVGL objects (`img_bubble`, `preview_image`) and setting various styles and alignments.
  - Generated code manipulates pre-existing LVGL objects (`preview_image_`, `emoji_box_`) using flags and timers.
- Functionality like alignment, styling, scroll behavior, and dynamic sizing present in the ground truth is absent in the generated version.

Functional Completeness:
- The generated code lacks core functionality present in the ground truth:
  - No creation of message bubbles or custom styling per assistant message.
  - No calculation of adaptive zoom/scale based on screen resolution and image size.
  - No centering or layout configuration of images within containers.
  - No auto-scrolling to bring the image into view.
  - Missing use of theme-based styling (e.g., colors, spacing).
  - Absence of user data tagging or event handling for resource cleanup related to LVGL lifecycle.
- Instead, it includes unrelated features like GIF controller interaction and timed visibility toggling that do not appear in the reference implementation.

Overall, the generated code implements a fundamentally different mechanism for displaying preview images, suggesting it was designed for a distinct architectural context compared to the ground truth.

results.query: complete the function SetChatMessage(const char *, const char *)()
results.description: The `LcdDisplay::SetChatMessage` function displays chat messages on the LCD screen, managing message history by removing old messages when necessary and handling special display rules for system messages. It creates styled message bubbles with appropriate sizing and positioning based on the message content and role (e.g., user, AI, system). The function also ensures that empty messages are not displayed and hides the AI logo when non-system messages are shown.

394: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
395: void LcdDisplay::SetupUI()
396: {
397:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
398: 
399:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
400:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
401:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
402:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
403: 
404:     auto screen = lv_screen_active();
405:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
406:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
407:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(screen, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
408: 
409:     /* Container */
410:     container_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
411:     lv_obj_set_size(container_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_VER_RES);
412:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(container_, 0, 0);
413:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(container_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
414:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container_, 0, 0);
415:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container_, 0, 0);
416:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(container_, 0, 0);
417:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
418:     lv_obj_set_style_border_color(container_, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
419: 
420:     /* Layer 1: Top bar - for status icons */
421:     top_bar_ = lv_obj_create(container_);
422:     lv_obj_set_size(top_bar_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
423:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(top_bar_, 0, 0);
424:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0); // 50% opacity background
425:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
426:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(top_bar_, 0, 0);
427:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(top_bar_, 0, 0);
428:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
429:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
430:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_left(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
431:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_right(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
432:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
433:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_SPACE_BETWEEN, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
434:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(top_bar_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
435: 
436:     // Left icon
437:     network_label_ = lv_label_create(top_bar_);
438:     lv_label_set_text(network_label_, "");
439:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
440:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
441: 
442:     // Right icons container
443:     lv_obj_t *right_icons = lv_obj_create(top_bar_);
444:     lv_obj_set_size(right_icons, LV_SIZE_CONTENT, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
445:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(right_icons, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
446:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(right_icons, 0, 0);
447:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(right_icons, 0, 0);
448:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(right_icons, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
449:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(right_icons, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_END, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
450: 
451:     mute_label_ = lv_label_create(right_icons);
452:     lv_label_set_text(mute_label_, "");
453:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
454:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
455: 
456:     battery_label_ = lv_label_create(right_icons);
457:     lv_label_set_text(battery_label_, "");
458:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
459:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
460:     lv_obj_set_style_margin_left(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
461: 
462:     /* Layer 2: Status bar - for center text labels */
463:     status_bar_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
464:     lv_obj_set_size(status_bar_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
465:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(status_bar_, 0, 0);
466:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(status_bar_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0); // Transparent background
467:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(status_bar_, 0, 0);
468:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(status_bar_, 0, 0);
469:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(status_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
470:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(status_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
471:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(status_bar_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
472:     lv_obj_set_style_layout(status_bar_, LV_LAYOUT_NONE, 0); // Use absolute positioning
473:     lv_obj_align(status_bar_, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);       // Overlap with top_bar_
474: 
475:     notification_label_ = lv_label_create(status_bar_);
476:     lv_obj_set_width(notification_label_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.8);
477:     lv_obj_set_style_text_align(notification_label_, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
478:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
479:     lv_label_set_text(notification_label_, "");
480:     lv_obj_align(notification_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
481:     lv_obj_add_flag(notification_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
482: 
483:     status_label_ = lv_label_create(status_bar_);
484:     lv_obj_set_width(status_label_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.8);
485:     lv_label_set_long_mode(status_label_, LV_LABEL_LONG_SCROLL_CIRCULAR);
486:     lv_obj_set_style_text_align(status_label_, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
487:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
488:     lv_label_set_text(status_label_, Lang::Strings::INITIALIZING);
489:     lv_obj_align(status_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
490: 
491:     /* Content - Chat area */
492:     content_ = lv_obj_create(container_);
493:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(content_, 0, 0);
494:     lv_obj_set_width(content_, LV_HOR_RES);
495:     lv_obj_set_flex_grow(content_, 1);
496:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(content_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
497:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(content_, 0, 0);
498:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(content_, lvgl_theme->chat_background_color(), 0); // Background for chat area
499: 
500:     // Enable scrolling for chat content
501:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(content_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
502:     lv_obj_set_scroll_dir(content_, LV_DIR_VER);
503:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
504:     // Set text color for contrast
505:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->system_text_color(), 0);
506: 
507:     // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
508:     lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"system");
509: 
510:     // Set appropriate width for content
511:     lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
512:     lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
513: 
514:     // Don't grow
515:     lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
516: }
517: 
518: // Create a full-width container for user messages to ensure right alignment
519: if (strcmp(role, "user") == 0)
520: {
521:     // Create a full-width container
522:     lv_obj_t *container = lv_obj_create(content_);
523:     lv_obj_set_width(container, LV_HOR_RES);
524:     lv_obj_set_height(container, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
525: 
526:     // Make container transparent and borderless
527:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
528:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container, 0, 0);
529:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container, 0, 0);
530: 
531:     // Move the message bubble into this container
532:     lv_obj_set_parent(msg_bubble, container);
533: 
534:     // Right align the bubble in the container
535:     lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_RIGHT_MID, -25, 0);
536: 
537:     // Auto-scroll to this container
538:     lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(container, LV_ANIM_ON);
539: }
540: else if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
541: {
542:     // Create full-width container for system messages to ensure center alignment
543:     lv_obj_t *container = lv_obj_create(content_);
544:     lv_obj_set_width(container, LV_HOR_RES);
545:     lv_obj_set_height(container, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
546: 
547:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
548:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container, 0, 0);
549:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container, 0, 0);
550: 
551:     lv_obj_set_parent(msg_bubble, container);
552:     lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
553:     lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(container, LV_ANIM_ON);
554: }
555: else
556: {
557:     // For assistant messages
558:     // Left align assistant messages
559:     lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
560: 
561:     // Auto-scroll to the message bubble
562:     lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(msg_bubble, LV_ANIM_ON);
563: }
564: 
565: // Store reference to the latest message label
566: chat_message_label_ = msg_text;
567: }

728: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
729: {
730:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
731:     if (preview_image_ == nullptr)
732:     {
733:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Preview image is not initialized");
734:         return;
735:     }
736: 
737:     if (image == nullptr)
738:     {
739:         esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
740:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_box_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
741:         lv_obj_add_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
742:         preview_image_cached_.reset();
743:         if (gif_controller_)
744:         {
745:             gif_controller_->Start();
746:         }
747:         return;
748:     }
749: 
750:     preview_image_cached_ = std::move(image);
751:     auto img_dsc = preview_image_cached_->image_dsc();
752:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image_, img_dsc);
753:     if (img_dsc->header.w > 0 && img_dsc->header.h > 0)
754:     {
755:         // zoom factor 0.5
756:         lv_image_set_scale(preview_image_, 128 * width_ / img_dsc->header.w);
757:     }
758: 
759:     // Hide emoji_box_
760:     if (gif_controller_)
761:     {
762:         gif_controller_->Stop();
763:     }
764:     lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_box_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
765:     lv_obj_remove_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
766:     esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
767:     ESP_ERROR_CHECK(esp_timer_start_once(preview_timer_, PREVIEW_IMAGE_DURATION_MS * 1000));
768: }
769: 
770: void LcdDisplay::SetChatMessage(const char *role, const char *content)

773:     if (chat_message_label_ == nullptr)

775:         return;
776:     }
777:     lv_label_set_text(chat_message_label_, content);
778: }

781: void LcdDisplay::SetEmotion(const char *emotion)
782: {
783:     // Stop any running GIF animation
784:     if (gif_controller_)
785:     {
786:         DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
787:         gif_controller_->Stop();
788:         gif_controller_.reset();
789:     }
790: 
791:     if (emoji_image_ == nullptr)
792:     {
793:         return;
794:     }
795: 
796:     auto emoji_collection = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_)->emoji_collection();
797:     auto image = emoji_collection != nullptr ? emoji_collection->GetEmojiImage(emotion) : nullptr;
798:     if (image == nullptr)
799:     {
800:         const char *utf8 = font_awesome_get_utf8(emotion);
801:         if (utf8 != nullptr && emoji_label_ != nullptr)
802:         {
803:             DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
804:             lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, utf8);
805:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
806:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
807:         }
808:         return;
809:     }
810: 
811:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
812:     if (image->IsGif())
813:     {
814:         // Create new GIF controller
815:         gif_controller_ = std::make_unique<LvglGif>(image->image_dsc());
816: 
817:         if (gif_controller_->IsLoaded())
818:         {
819:             // Set up frame update callback
820:             gif_controller_->SetFrameCallback([this]()
821:                                               { lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc()); });
822: 
823:             // Set initial frame and start animation
824:             lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, gif_controller_->image_dsc());
825:             gif_controller_->Start();
826: 
827:             // Show GIF, hide others
828:             lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
829:             lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
830:         }
831:         else
832:         {
833:             ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to load GIF for emotion: %s", emotion);
834:             gif_controller_.reset();
835:         }
836:     }
837:     else
838:     {
839:         lv_image_set_src(emoji_image_, image->image_dsc());
840:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
841:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
842:     }

844: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
845:     // In WeChat message style, if emotion is neutral, don't display it
846:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
847:     if (strcmp(emotion, "neutral") == 0 && child_count > 0)

857:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);

862: void LcdDisplay::SetTheme(Theme *theme)
863: {
864:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
865: 
866:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(theme);
867: 
868:     // Get the active screen
869:     lv_obj_t *screen = lv_screen_active();
870: 
871:     // Set font
872:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
873:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
874:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
875: 
876:     if (text_font->line_height >= 40)
877:     {
878:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
879:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
880:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
881:     }
882:     else
883:     {
884:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
885:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
886:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
887:     }
888: 
889:     // Set parent text color
890:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
891:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
892: 
893:     // Set background image
894:     if (lvgl_theme->background_image() != nullptr)
895:     {
896:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, lvgl_theme->background_image()->image_dsc(), 0);
897:     }
898:     else
899:     {
900:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, nullptr, 0);
901:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
902:     }
903: 
904:     // Update top bar background color with 50% opacity
905:     if (top_bar_ != nullptr)
906:     {
907:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
908:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
909:     }
910: 
911:     // Update status bar elements
912:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
913:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
914:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
915:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
916:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
917:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
918: 
919:     // If we have the chat message style, update all message bubbles
920: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
921:     // Set content background opacity
922:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(content_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
923: 
924:     // Iterate through all children of content (message containers or bubbles)
925:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
926:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < child_count; i++)
927:     {
928:         lv_obj_t *obj = lv_obj_get_child(content_, i);
929:         if (obj == nullptr)
930:             continue;
931: 
932:         lv_obj_t *bubble = nullptr;
933: 
934:         // Check if this object is a container or bubble
935:         // If it's a container (user or system message), get its child as bubble
936:         // If it's a bubble (assistant message), use it directly
937:         if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(obj) > 0)
938:         {
939:             // Might be a container, check if it's a user or system message container
940:             // User and system message containers are transparent
941:             lv_opa_t bg_opa = lv_obj_get_style_bg_opa(obj, 0);
942:             if (bg_opa == LV_OPA_TRANSP)
943:             {
944:                 // This is a user or system message container
945:                 bubble = lv_obj_get_child(obj, 0);
946:             }
947:             else
948:             {
949:                 // This might be an assistant message bubble itself
950:                 bubble = obj;
951:             }
952:         }
953:         else
954:         {
955:             // No child elements, might be other UI elements, skip
956:             continue;
957:         }
958: 
959:         if (bubble == nullptr)
960:             continue;
961: 
962:         // Use saved user data to identify bubble type
963:         void *bubble_type_ptr = lv_obj_get_user_data(bubble);
964:         if (bubble_type_ptr != nullptr)
965:         {
966:             const char *bubble_type = static_cast<const char *>(bubble_type_ptr);
967: 
968:             // Apply correct color based on bubble type
969:             if (strcmp(bubble_type, "user") == 0)
970:             {
971:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->user_bubble_color(), 0);
972:             }
973:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "assistant") == 0)
974:             {
975:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
976:             }
977:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
978:             {
979:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
980:             }
981:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "image") == 0)
982:             {
983:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
984:             }
985: 
986:             // Update border color
987:             lv_obj_set_style_border_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
988: 
989:             // Update text color for the message
990:             if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(bubble) > 0)
991:             {
992:                 lv_obj_t *text = lv_obj_get_child(bubble, 0);
993:                 if (text != nullptr)
994:                 {
995:                     // Set text color based on bubble type
996:                     if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
997:                     {
998:                         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(text, lvgl_theme->system_text_color(), 0);
999:                     }
1000:                     else
1001:                     {
1002:                         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1003:                     }
1004:                 }
1005:             }
1006:         }
1007:         else
1008:         {
1009:             ESP_LOGW(TAG, "child[%lu] Bubble type is not found", i);
1010:         }
1011:     }
1012: #else
1013:     // Simple UI mode - just update the main chat message
1014:     if (chat_message_label_ != nullptr)
1015:     {
1016:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(chat_message_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1017:     }
1018: 
1019:     if (emoji_label_ != nullptr)
1020:     {
1021:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1022:     }
1023: 
1024:     // Update bottom bar background color with 50% opacity
1025:     if (bottom_bar_ != nullptr)
1026:     {
1027:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(bottom_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
1028:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bottom_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1029:     }
1030: #endif
1031: 
1032:     // Update low battery popup
1033:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->low_battery_color(), 0);
1034: 
1035:     // No errors occurred. Save theme to settings
1036:     Display::SetTheme(lvgl_theme);
1037: }

The `LcdDisplay::SetChatMessage` function displays chat messages on the LCD screen, managing message history by removing old messages when necessary and handling special display rules for system messages. It creates styled message bubbles with appropriate sizing and positioning based on the message content and role (e.g., user, AI, system). The function also ensures that empty messages are not displayed and hides the AI logo when non-system messages are shown.

qualitative.analysis:
Semantic Correctness:
- The generated code captures basic functionality like creating message bubbles and applying different styles for roles.
- However, it lacks critical logic such as enforcing maximum message limits, collapsing consecutive system messages, proper width calculation of text bubbles, and correct handling of dynamic content layout.
- Conditional compilation (`#if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE`) introduces divergence from the expected behavior in all cases.

Structure Similarity:
- Both codes follow a similar high-level pattern: locking display access, checking inputs, creating UI elements with LVGL APIs, styling based on role, and scrolling to new messages.
- Differences include inconsistent use of theme objects (`lvgl_theme_` vs `static_cast<LvglTheme*>`), missing helper functions (e.g., `lv_txt_get_width`), and divergent object hierarchy management.
- Some structural differences are due to simplified or omitted steps in the generated version (e.g., no MAX_MESSAGES enforcement).

Functional Completeness:
- Key features missing in generated code: automatic removal of old messages when exceeding MAX_MESSAGES, merging of successive system messages, precise bubble sizing using font metrics, consistent usage of theme-based properties, and dedicated handling of emoji label visibility beyond simple flag setting.
- The generated code does implement core visual distinction between user/system/assistant messages and supports scrolling, but omits nuanced behaviors essential for rich chat UI experience.

results.description: The `LcdDisplay::SetEmotion` function updates the LCD display to show a specified emotional expression, either as a static image or an animated GIF. It handles the loading and rendering of emoji assets, manages GIF animations, and ensures proper display visibility based on the emotion type and configuration settings. If the emotion is neutral and WeChat-style messaging is enabled, it hides the emotion display entirely.

253: MipiLcdDisplay::MipiLcdDisplay(esp_lcd_panel_io_handle_t panel_io, esp_lcd_panel_handle_t panel,
254:                                int width, int height, int offset_x, int offset_y,
255:                                bool mirror_x, bool mirror_y, bool swap_xy)
256:     : LcdDisplay(panel_io, panel, width, height)
257: {
258: 
259:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initialize LVGL library");
260:     lv_init();
261: 
262:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Initialize LVGL port");
263:     lvgl_port_cfg_t port_cfg = ESP_LVGL_PORT_INIT_CONFIG();
264:     lvgl_port_init(&port_cfg);
265: 
266:     ESP_LOGI(TAG, "Adding LCD display");
267:     const lvgl_port_display_cfg_t disp_cfg = {
268:         .io_handle = panel_io,
269:         .panel_handle = panel,
270:         .control_handle = nullptr,
271:         .buffer_size = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_ * 50),
272:         .double_buffer = false,
273:         .hres = static_cast<uint32_t>(width_),
274:         .vres = static_cast<uint32_t>(height_),
275:         .monochrome = false,
276:         /* Rotation values must be same as used in esp_lcd for initial settings of the screen */
277:         .rotation = {
278:             .swap_xy = swap_xy,
279:             .mirror_x = mirror_x,
280:             .mirror_y = mirror_y,
281:         },
282:         .flags = {
283:             .buff_dma = true,
284:             .buff_spiram = false,
285:             .sw_rotate = true,
286:         },
287:     };
288: 
289:     const lvgl_port_display_dsi_cfg_t dpi_cfg = {
290:         .flags = {
291:             .avoid_tearing = false,
292:         }};
293:     display_ = lvgl_port_add_disp_dsi(&disp_cfg, &dpi_cfg);
294:     if (display_ == nullptr)
295:     {
296:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Failed to add display");
297:         return;
298:     }
299: 
300:     if (offset_x != 0 || offset_y != 0)
301:     {
302:         lv_display_set_offset(display_, offset_x, offset_y);
303:     }
304: 
305:     SetupUI();
306: }

308: LcdDisplay::~LcdDisplay()
309: {
310:     SetPreviewImage(nullptr);
311: 
312:     // Clean up GIF controller
313:     if (gif_controller_)
314:     {
315:         gif_controller_->Stop();
316:         gif_controller_.reset();
317:     }
318: 
319:     if (preview_timer_ != nullptr)
320:     {
321:         esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
322:         esp_timer_delete(preview_timer_);
323:     }
324: 
325:     if (preview_image_ != nullptr)
326:     {
327:         lv_obj_del(preview_image_);
328:     }
329:     if (chat_message_label_ != nullptr)
330:     {
331:         lv_obj_del(chat_message_label_);
332:     }
333:     if (emoji_label_ != nullptr)
334:     {
335:         lv_obj_del(emoji_label_);
336:     }
337:     if (emoji_image_ != nullptr)
338:     {
339:         lv_obj_del(emoji_image_);
340:     }
341:     if (emoji_box_ != nullptr)
342:     {
343:         lv_obj_del(emoji_box_);
344:     }
345:     if (content_ != nullptr)
346:     {
347:         lv_obj_del(content_);
348:     }
349:     if (bottom_bar_ != nullptr)
350:     {
351:         lv_obj_del(bottom_bar_);
352:     }
353:     if (status_bar_ != nullptr)
354:     {
355:         lv_obj_del(status_bar_);
356:     }
357:     if (top_bar_ != nullptr)
358:     {
359:         lv_obj_del(top_bar_);
360:     }
361:     if (side_bar_ != nullptr)
362:     {
363:         lv_obj_del(side_bar_);
364:     }
365:     if (container_ != nullptr)
366:     {
367:         lv_obj_del(container_);
368:     }
369:     if (display_ != nullptr)
370:     {
371:         lv_display_delete(display_);
372:     }
373: 
374:     if (panel_ != nullptr)
375:     {
376:         esp_lcd_panel_del(panel_);
377:     }
378:     if (panel_io_ != nullptr)
379:     {
380:         esp_lcd_panel_io_del(panel_io_);
381:     }
382: }

394: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
395: void LcdDisplay::SetupUI()
396: {
397:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
398: 
399:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
400:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
401:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
402:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
403: 
404:     auto screen = lv_screen_active();
405:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
406:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
407:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(screen, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
408: 
409:     /* Container */
410:     container_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
411:     lv_obj_set_size(container_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_VER_RES);
412:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(container_, 0, 0);
413:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(container_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
414:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container_, 0, 0);
415:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container_, 0, 0);
416:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(container_, 0, 0);
417:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
418:     lv_obj_set_style_border_color(container_, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
419: 
420:     /* Layer 1: Top bar - for status icons */
421:     top_bar_ = lv_obj_create(container_);
422:     lv_obj_set_size(top_bar_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
423:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(top_bar_, 0, 0);
424:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0); // 50% opacity background
425:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
426:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(top_bar_, 0, 0);
427:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(top_bar_, 0, 0);
428:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
429:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
430:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_left(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
431:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_right(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
432:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
433:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(top_bar_, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_SPACE_BETWEEN, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
434:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(top_bar_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
435: 
436:     // Left icon
437:     network_label_ = lv_label_create(top_bar_);
438:     lv_label_set_text(network_label_, "");
439:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
440:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
441: 
442:     // Right icons container
443:     lv_obj_t *right_icons = lv_obj_create(top_bar_);
444:     lv_obj_set_size(right_icons, LV_SIZE_CONTENT, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
445:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(right_icons, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
446:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(right_icons, 0, 0);
447:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(right_icons, 0, 0);
448:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(right_icons, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
449:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(right_icons, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_END, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
450: 
451:     mute_label_ = lv_label_create(right_icons);
452:     lv_label_set_text(mute_label_, "");
453:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
454:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
455: 
456:     battery_label_ = lv_label_create(right_icons);
457:     lv_label_set_text(battery_label_, "");
458:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
459:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
460:     lv_obj_set_style_margin_left(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
461: 
462:     /* Layer 2: Status bar - for center text labels */
463:     status_bar_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
464:     lv_obj_set_size(status_bar_, LV_HOR_RES, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
465:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(status_bar_, 0, 0);
466:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(status_bar_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0); // Transparent background
467:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(status_bar_, 0, 0);
468:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(status_bar_, 0, 0);
469:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(status_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
470:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(status_bar_, lvgl_theme->spacing(2), 0);
471:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(status_bar_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
472:     lv_obj_set_style_layout(status_bar_, LV_LAYOUT_NONE, 0); // Use absolute positioning
473:     lv_obj_align(status_bar_, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);       // Overlap with top_bar_
474: 
475:     notification_label_ = lv_label_create(status_bar_);
476:     lv_obj_set_width(notification_label_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.8);
477:     lv_obj_set_style_text_align(notification_label_, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
478:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
479:     lv_label_set_text(notification_label_, "");
480:     lv_obj_align(notification_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
481:     lv_obj_add_flag(notification_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
482: 
483:     status_label_ = lv_label_create(status_bar_);
484:     lv_obj_set_width(status_label_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.8);
485:     lv_label_set_long_mode(status_label_, LV_LABEL_LONG_SCROLL_CIRCULAR);
486:     lv_obj_set_style_text_align(status_label_, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
487:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
488:     lv_label_set_text(status_label_, Lang::Strings::INITIALIZING);
489:     lv_obj_align(status_label_, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
490: 
491:     /* Content - Chat area */
492:     content_ = lv_obj_create(container_);
493:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(content_, 0, 0);
494:     lv_obj_set_width(content_, LV_HOR_RES);
495:     lv_obj_set_flex_grow(content_, 1);
496:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(content_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
497:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(content_, 0, 0);
498:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(content_, lvgl_theme->chat_background_color(), 0); // Background for chat area
499: 
500:     // Enable scrolling for chat content
501:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(content_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
502:     lv_obj_set_scroll_dir(content_, LV_DIR_VER);
503: 
504:     // Create a flex container for chat messages
505:     lv_obj_set_flex_flow(content_, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
506:     lv_obj_set_flex_align(content_, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START);
507:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(content_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0); // Space between messages
508: 
509:     // We'll create chat messages dynamically in SetChatMessage
510:     chat_message_label_ = nullptr;
511: 
512:     low_battery_popup_ = lv_obj_create(screen);
513:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(low_battery_popup_, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
514:     lv_obj_set_size(low_battery_popup_, LV_HOR_RES * 0.9, text_font->line_height * 2);
515:     lv_obj_align(low_battery_popup_, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, -lvgl_theme->spacing(4));
516:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->low_battery_color(), 0);
517:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(low_battery_popup_, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
518:     low_battery_label_ = lv_label_create(low_battery_popup_);
519:     lv_label_set_text(low_battery_label_, Lang::Strings::BATTERY_NEED_CHARGE);
520:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(low_battery_label_, lv_color_white(), 0);
521:     lv_obj_center(low_battery_label_);
522:     lv_obj_add_flag(low_battery_popup_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
523: 
524:     emoji_image_ = lv_img_create(screen);
525:     lv_obj_align(emoji_image_, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, text_font->line_height + lvgl_theme->spacing(8));
526: 
527:     // Display AI logo while booting
528:     emoji_label_ = lv_label_create(screen);
529:     lv_obj_center(emoji_label_);
530:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(emoji_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
531:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
532:     lv_label_set_text(emoji_label_, FONT_AWESOME_MICROCHIP_AI);
533: }
534: #if CONFIG_IDF_TARGET_ESP32P4
535: #define MAX_MESSAGES 40
536: #else
537: #define MAX_MESSAGES 20
538: #endif
539: void LcdDisplay::SetChatMessage(const char *role, const char *content)
540: {
541:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
542:     if (content_ == nullptr)
543:     {
544:         return;
545:     }
546: 
547:     // Check if message count exceeds limit
548:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
549:     if (child_count >= MAX_MESSAGES)
550:     {
551:         // Delete the oldest message (first child object)
552:         lv_obj_t *first_child = lv_obj_get_child(content_, 0);
553:         lv_obj_t *last_child = lv_obj_get_child(content_, child_count - 1);
554:         if (first_child != nullptr)
555:         {
556:             lv_obj_del(first_child);
557:         }
558:         // Scroll to the last message immediately
559:         if (last_child != nullptr)
560:         {
561:             lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(last_child, LV_ANIM_OFF);
562:         }
563:     }
564: 
565:     // Collapse system messages (if it's a system message, check if the last message is also a system message)
566:     if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
567:     {
568:         if (child_count > 0)
569:         {
570:             // Get the last message container
571:             lv_obj_t *last_container = lv_obj_get_child(content_, child_count - 1);
572:             if (last_container != nullptr && lv_obj_get_child_cnt(last_container) > 0)
573:             {
574:                 // Get the bubble inside the container
575:                 lv_obj_t *last_bubble = lv_obj_get_child(last_container, 0);
576:                 if (last_bubble != nullptr)
577:                 {
578:                     // Check if bubble type is system message
579:                     void *bubble_type_ptr = lv_obj_get_user_data(last_bubble);
580:                     if (bubble_type_ptr != nullptr && strcmp((const char *)bubble_type_ptr, "system") == 0)
581:                     {
582:                         // If the last message is also a system message, delete it
583:                         lv_obj_del(last_container);
584:                     }
585:                 }
586:             }
587:         }
588:     }
589:     else
590:     {
591:         // Hide the centered AI logo
592:         lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_label_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
593:     }
594: 
595:     // Avoid empty message boxes
596:     if (strlen(content) == 0)
597:     {
598:         return;
599:     }
600: 
601:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
602:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
603: 
604:     // Create a message bubble
605:     lv_obj_t *msg_bubble = lv_obj_create(content_);
606:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(msg_bubble, 8, 0);
607:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(msg_bubble, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
608:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
609:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
610: 
611:     // Create the message text
612:     lv_obj_t *msg_text = lv_label_create(msg_bubble);
613:     lv_label_set_text(msg_text, content);
614: 
615:     // Calculate actual text width
616:     lv_coord_t text_width = lv_txt_get_width(content, strlen(content), text_font, 0);
617: 
618:     // Calculate bubble width
619:     lv_coord_t max_width = LV_HOR_RES * 85 / 100 - 16; // 85% of screen width
620:     lv_coord_t min_width = 20;
621:     lv_coord_t bubble_width;
622: 
623:     // Ensure text width is not less than minimum width
624:     if (text_width < min_width)
625:     {
626:         text_width = min_width;
627:     }
628: 
629:     // If text width is less than max width, use text width
630:     if (text_width < max_width)
631:     {
632:         bubble_width = text_width;
633:     }
634:     else
635:     {
636:         bubble_width = max_width;
637:     }
638: 
639:     // Set message text width
640:     lv_obj_set_width(msg_text, bubble_width); // Subtract padding
641:     lv_label_set_long_mode(msg_text, LV_LABEL_LONG_WRAP);
642: 
643:     // Set bubble width
644:     lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, bubble_width);
645:     lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
646: 
647:     // Set alignment and style based on message role
648:     if (strcmp(role, "user") == 0)
649:     {
650:         // User messages are right-aligned with green background
651:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->user_bubble_color(), 0);
652:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
653:         // Set text color for contrast
654:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
655: 
656:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
657:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"user");
658: 
659:         // Set appropriate width for content
660:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
661:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
662: 
663:         // Don't grow
664:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
665:     }
666:     else if (strcmp(role, "assistant") == 0)
667:     {
668:         // Assistant messages are left-aligned with white background
669:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
670:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
671:         // Set text color for contrast
672:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
673: 
674:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
675:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"assistant");
676: 
677:         // Set appropriate width for content
678:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
679:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
680: 
681:         // Don't grow
682:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
683:     }
684:     else if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
685:     {
686:         // System messages are center-aligned with light gray background
687:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(msg_bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
688:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(msg_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
689:         // Set text color for contrast
690:         lv_obj_set_style_text_color(msg_text, lvgl_theme->system_text_color(), 0);
691: 
692:         // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
693:         lv_obj_set_user_data(msg_bubble, (void *)"system");
694: 
695:         // Set appropriate width for content
696:         lv_obj_set_width(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
697:         lv_obj_set_height(msg_bubble, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
698: 
699:         // Don't grow
700:         lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(msg_bubble, 0, 0);
701:     }
702: 
703:     // Create a full-width container for user messages to ensure right alignment
704:     if (strcmp(role, "user") == 0)
705:     {
706:         // Create a full-width container
707:         lv_obj_t *container = lv_obj_create(content_);
708:         lv_obj_set_width(container, LV_HOR_RES);
709:         lv_obj_set_height(container, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
710: 
711:         // Make container transparent and borderless
712:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
713:         lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container, 0, 0);
714:         lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container, 0, 0);
715: 
716:         // Move the message bubble into this container
717:         lv_obj_set_parent(msg_bubble, container);
718: 
719:         // Right align the bubble in the container
720:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_RIGHT_MID, -25, 0);
721: 
722:         // Auto-scroll to this container
723:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(container, LV_ANIM_ON);
724:     }
725:     else if (strcmp(role, "system") == 0)
726:     {
727:         // Create full-width container for system messages to ensure center alignment
728:         lv_obj_t *container = lv_obj_create(content_);
729:         lv_obj_set_width(container, LV_HOR_RES);
730:         lv_obj_set_height(container, LV_SIZE_CONTENT);
731: 
732:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
733:         lv_obj_set_style_border_width(container, 0, 0);
734:         lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(container, 0, 0);
735: 
736:         lv_obj_set_parent(msg_bubble, container);
737:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
738:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(container, LV_ANIM_ON);
739:     }
740:     else
741:     {
742:         // For assistant messages
743:         // Left align assistant messages
744:         lv_obj_align(msg_bubble, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
745: 
746:         // Auto-scroll to the message bubble
747:         lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(msg_bubble, LV_ANIM_ON);
748:     }
749: 
750:     // Store reference to the latest message label
751:     chat_message_label_ = msg_text;
752: }
753: 
754: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
755: {
756:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
757:     if (content_ == nullptr)
758:     {
759:         return;
760:     }
761: 
762:     if (image == nullptr)
763:     {
764:         return;
765:     }
766: 
767:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(current_theme_);
768:     // Create a message bubble for image preview
769:     lv_obj_t *img_bubble = lv_obj_create(content_);
770:     lv_obj_set_style_radius(img_bubble, 8, 0);
771:     lv_obj_set_scrollbar_mode(img_bubble, LV_SCROLLBAR_MODE_OFF);
772:     lv_obj_set_style_border_width(img_bubble, 0, 0);
773:     lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->spacing(4), 0);
774: 
775:     // Set image bubble background color (similar to system message)
776:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(img_bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
777:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(img_bubble, LV_OPA_70, 0);
778: 
779:     // Set custom attribute to mark bubble type
780:     lv_obj_set_user_data(img_bubble, (void *)"image");
781: 
782:     // Create the image object inside the bubble
783:     lv_obj_t *preview_image = lv_image_create(img_bubble);
784: 
785:     // Calculate appropriate size for the image
786:     lv_coord_t max_width = LV_HOR_RES * 70 / 100;  // 70% of screen width
787:     lv_coord_t max_height = LV_VER_RES * 50 / 100; // 50% of screen height
788: 
789:     // Calculate zoom factor to fit within maximum dimensions
790:     auto img_dsc = image->image_dsc();
791:     lv_coord_t img_width = img_dsc->header.w;
792:     lv_coord_t img_height = img_dsc->header.h;
793:     if (img_width == 0 || img_height == 0)
794:     {
795:         img_width = max_width;
796:         img_height = max_height;
797:         ESP_LOGW(TAG, "Invalid image dimensions: %ld x %ld, using default dimensions: %ld x %ld", img_width, img_height, max_width, max_height);
798:     }
799: 
800:     lv_coord_t zoom_w = (max_width * 256) / img_width;
801:     lv_coord_t zoom_h = (max_height * 256) / img_height;
802:     lv_coord_t zoom = (zoom_w < zoom_h) ? zoom_w : zoom_h;
803: 
804:     // Ensure zoom doesn't exceed 256 (100%)
805:     if (zoom > 256)
806:         zoom = 256;
807: 
808:     // Set image properties
809:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image, img_dsc);
810:     lv_image_set_scale(preview_image, zoom);
811: 
812:     // Add event handler to clean up LvglImage when image is deleted
813:     // We need to transfer ownership of the unique_ptr to the event callback
814:     LvglImage *raw_image = image.release(); // Release ownership of smart pointer
815:     lv_obj_add_event_cb(preview_image, [](lv_event_t *e)
816:                         {
817:         LvglImage* img = (LvglImage*)lv_event_get_user_data(e);
818:         if (img != nullptr) {
819:             delete img; // Properly release memory by deleting LvglImage object
820:         } }, LV_EVENT_DELETE, (void *)raw_image);
821: 
822:     // Calculate actual scaled image dimensions
823:     lv_coord_t scaled_width = (img_width * zoom) / 256;
824:     lv_coord_t scaled_height = (img_height * zoom) / 256;
825: 
826:     // Set bubble size to be 16 pixels larger than the image (8 pixels on each side)
827:     lv_obj_set_width(img_bubble, scaled_width + 16);
828:     lv_obj_set_height(img_bubble, scaled_height + 16);
829: 
830:     // Don't grow in flex layout
831:     lv_obj_set_style_flex_grow(img_bubble, 0, 0);
832: 
833:     // Center the image within the bubble
834:     lv_obj_center(preview_image);
835: 
836:     // Left align the image bubble like assistant messages
837:     lv_obj_align(img_bubble, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
838: 
839:     // Auto-scroll to the image bubble
840:     lv_obj_scroll_to_view_recursive(img_bubble, LV_ANIM_ON);
841: }
842: #else

998: void LcdDisplay::SetPreviewImage(std::unique_ptr<LvglImage> image)
999: {
1000:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
1001:     if (preview_image_ == nullptr)
1002:     {
1003:         ESP_LOGE(TAG, "Preview image is not initialized");
1004:         return;
1005:     }
1006: 
1007:     if (image == nullptr)
1008:     {
1009:         esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
1010:         lv_obj_remove_flag(emoji_box_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1011:         lv_obj_add_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1012:         preview_image_cached_.reset();
1013:         if (gif_controller_)
1014:         {
1015:             gif_controller_->Start();
1016:         }
1017:         return;
1018:     }
1019: 
1020:     preview_image_cached_ = std::move(image);
1021:     auto img_dsc = preview_image_cached_->image_dsc();
1022:     lv_image_set_src(preview_image_, img_dsc);
1023:     if (img_dsc->header.w > 0 && img_dsc->header.h > 0)
1024:     {
1025:         // zoom factor 0.5
1026:         lv_image_set_scale(preview_image_, 128 * width_ / img_dsc->header.w);
1027:     }
1028: 
1029:     // Hide emoji_box_
1030:     if (gif_controller_)
1031:     {
1032:         gif_controller_->Stop();
1033:     }
1034:     lv_obj_add_flag(emoji_box_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1035:     lv_obj_remove_flag(preview_image_, LV_OBJ_FLAG_HIDDEN);
1036:     esp_timer_stop(preview_timer_);
1037:     ESP_ERROR_CHECK(esp_timer_start_once(preview_timer_, PREVIEW_IMAGE_DURATION_MS * 1000));
1038: }

1055: void LcdDisplay::SetTheme(Theme *theme)
1056: {
1057:     DisplayLockGuard lock(this);
1058: 
1059:     auto lvgl_theme = static_cast<LvglTheme *>(theme);
1060: 
1061:     // Get the active screen
1062:     lv_obj_t *screen = lv_screen_active();
1063: 
1064:     // Set font
1065:     auto text_font = lvgl_theme->text_font()->font();
1066:     auto icon_font = lvgl_theme->icon_font()->font();
1067:     auto large_icon_font = lvgl_theme->large_icon_font()->font();
1068: 
1069:     if (text_font->line_height >= 40)
1070:     {
1071:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1072:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1073:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, large_icon_font, 0);
1074:     }
1075:     else
1076:     {
1077:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(mute_label_, icon_font, 0);
1078:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(battery_label_, icon_font, 0);
1079:         lv_obj_set_style_text_font(network_label_, icon_font, 0);
1080:     }
1081: 
1082:     // Set parent text color
1083:     lv_obj_set_style_text_font(screen, text_font, 0);
1084:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(screen, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1085: 
1086:     // Set background image
1087:     if (lvgl_theme->background_image() != nullptr)
1088:     {
1089:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, lvgl_theme->background_image()->image_dsc(), 0);
1090:     }
1091:     else
1092:     {
1093:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_image_src(container_, nullptr, 0);
1094:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(container_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1095:     }
1096: 
1097:     // Update top bar background color with 50% opacity
1098:     if (top_bar_ != nullptr)
1099:     {
1100:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(top_bar_, LV_OPA_50, 0);
1101:         lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(top_bar_, lvgl_theme->background_color(), 0);
1102:     }
1103: 
1104:     // Update status bar elements
1105:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(network_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1106:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1107:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(notification_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1108:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(mute_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1109:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(battery_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1110:     lv_obj_set_style_text_color(emoji_label_, lvgl_theme->text_color(), 0);
1111: 
1112:     // If we have the chat message style, update all message bubbles
1113: #if CONFIG_USE_WECHAT_MESSAGE_STYLE
1114:     // Set content background opacity
1115:     lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(content_, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
1116: 
1117:     // Iterate through all children of content (message containers or bubbles)
1118:     uint32_t child_count = lv_obj_get_child_cnt(content_);
1119:     for (uint32_t i = 0; i < child_count; i++)
1120:     {
1121:         lv_obj_t *obj = lv_obj_get_child(content_, i);
1122:         if (obj == nullptr)
1123:             continue;
1124: 
1125:         lv_obj_t *bubble = nullptr;
1126: 
1127:         // Check if this object is a container or bubble
1128:         // If it's a container (user or system message), get its child as bubble
1129:         // If it's a bubble (assistant message), use it directly
1130:         if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(obj) > 0)
1131:         {
1132:             // Might be a container, check if it's a user or system message container
1133:             // User and system message containers are transparent
1134:             lv_opa_t bg_opa = lv_obj_get_style_bg_opa(obj, 0);
1135:             if (bg_opa == LV_OPA_TRANSP)
1136:             {
1137:                 // This is a user or system message container
1138:                 bubble = lv_obj_get_child(obj, 0);
1139:             }
1140:             else
1141:             {
1142:                 // This might be an assistant message bubble itself
1143:                 bubble = obj;
1144:             }
1145:         }
1146:         else
1147:         {
1148:             // No child elements, might be other UI elements, skip
1149:             continue;
1150:         }
1151: 
1152:         if (bubble == nullptr)
1153:             continue;
1154: 
1155:         // Use saved user data to identify bubble type
1156:         void *bubble_type_ptr = lv_obj_get_user_data(bubble);
1157:         if (bubble_type_ptr != nullptr)
1158:         {
1159:             const char *bubble_type = static_cast<const char *>(bubble_type_ptr);
1160: 
1161:             // Apply correct color based on bubble type
1162:             if (strcmp(bubble_type, "user") == 0)
1163:             {
1164:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->user_bubble_color(), 0);
1165:             }
1166:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "assistant") == 0)
1167:             {
1168:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->assistant_bubble_color(), 0);
1169:             }
1170:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "system") == 0)
1171:             {
1172:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
1173:             }
1174:             else if (strcmp(bubble_type, "image") == 0)
1175:             {
1176:                 lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->system_bubble_color(), 0);
1177:             }
1178: 
1179:             // Update border color
1180:             lv_obj_set_style_border_color(bubble, lvgl_theme->border_color(), 0);
1181: 
1182:             // Update text color for the message
1183:             if (lv_obj_get_child_cnt(bubble) > 0)
1184:             {
1185:                 lv_obj_t *text = lv_obj_get_child(bubble, 0);
1186:                 if (text != nullptr)
1187:                 {
1188:                     // Set text color based on bubble type

The `LcdDisplay::SetEmotion` function updates the LCD display to show a specified emotional expression, either as a static image or an animated GIF. It handles the loading and rendering of emoji assets, manages GIF animations, and ensures proper display visibility based on the emotion type and configuration settings. If the emotion is neutral and WeChat-style messaging is enabled, it hides the emotion display entirely.

results.description: The `LcdDisplay::SetTheme` function applies a specified visual theme to the LCD display by updating fonts, colors, background images, and styles for various UI elements including labels, status bars, and message bubbles. It supports dynamic adjustments based on font size and ensures consistent styling across the interface while maintaining thread safety through a display lock. The function also handles optional background images and semi-transparent overlays for enhanced visual presentation.
